question: 异环怎么升级角色快？
questionEn: How to level up characters fast in NTE?
answer: 异环角色升级主要通过消耗猎手指南和信用点来完成。快速升级建议：1) 每天刷满体力对应的材料副本；2) 优先使用基础猎手指南，进阶和精英指南留给高等级阶段；3) 完成每日任务和活动获取额外经验；4) 合理规划体力，优先刷当前等级阶段需要的材料。
answerEn: To level up characters quickly in NTE: 1) Use all daily stamina on material domains; 2) Save Advanced and Elite Hunter Guides for higher levels; 3) Complete daily quests and events for bonus EXP; 4) Plan your stamina usage to farm materials for your current level range.

question: 异环材料副本在哪里？
questionEn: Where are material domains in NTE?
answer: 异环的材料副本（领域）可以通过主界面右上角的「领域」入口进入。不同属性的领域掉落不同类型的升级材料。建议每天刷满体力对应的副本，尤其是高级副本掉落的精英猎手指南和许可证明较为稀缺。
answerEn: Material domains in NTE can be accessed through the "Domain" entry on the top-right of the main screen. Different attribute domains drop different types of leveling materials. It's recommended to use all daily stamina on domains, especially higher-level ones that drop rare Elite Hunter Guides and Permits.

question: 异环信用点怎么获取？
questionEn: How to get Credits in NTE?
answer: 信用点是异环中的基础货币，获取途径包括：1) 完成主线任务和支线任务；2) 每日委托任务奖励；3) 探索开放世界中的宝箱；4) 完成成就；5) 参与限时活动。信用点主要用于角色升级、技能升级和购买基础材料。
answerEn: Credits are the basic currency in NTE. You can earn them through: 1) Main story and side quests; 2) Daily commission rewards; 3) Exploring treasure chests in the open world; 4) Completing achievements; 5) Participating in limited-time events. Credits are used for character leveling, skill upgrades, and purchasing basic materials.

question: 异环S级角色有哪些？
questionEn: What are the S-rank characters in NTE?
answer: 异环目前的S级角色包括：娜娜莉（生命/格斗）、咲里（咒术/支援）、法蒂亚、拉克莉莫萨、白藏、爱德勒、斯奇亚、零、哈尼尔、哈索尔、弥安、阿尔法德、泰格多等。S级角色整体强度高于A级角色，但A级角色在合理培养后同样可以在大部分内容中表现出色。
answerEn: Current S-rank characters in NTE include: Nanally (Anima/Fangs and Claws), Sakiri (Incantation/Support), Fadia, Lacrimosa, Baicang, Adler, Skia, Zero, Haniel, Hathor, Mint, Alphard, Taygedo, and more. While S-rank characters generally have higher stats, well-built A-rank characters can also perform well in most content.

question: 异环属性克制关系是什么？
questionEn: What is the attribute weakness system in NTE?
answer: 异环中存在六种属性：生命、咒术、混沌、灵魂、宇宙、相。不同属性之间存在克制关系，利用属性克制可以对敌人造成更多伤害。在战斗中，观察敌人的属性弱点，切换对应属性的角色进行攻击，可以大幅提高战斗效率。属性克制通常造成约1.5倍的额外伤害。
answerEn: NTE has six attributes: Anima, Incantation, Chaos, Psyche, Cosmos, and Lakshana. Different attributes have weakness relationships, and exploiting them deals bonus damage. In combat, observe enemy weaknesses and switch to characters with the corresponding attribute for significantly better efficiency. Attribute weakness typically deals around 1.5x bonus damage.

question: 异环每日体力怎么用最划算？
questionEn: How to use daily stamina most efficiently in NTE?
answer: 体力使用的优先级建议：1) 优先刷当前最缺的材料副本（通常是角色升级材料）；2) 如果有正在培养的角色，刷对应的属性材料；3) 每日委托和任务优先完成，通常也会消耗体力；4) 限时活动期间的体力优先用于活动副本。不建议将体力浪费在低等级材料上，后期可以通过其他途径获取。
answerEn: Recommended stamina priority: 1) Farm the materials you need most (usually character leveling materials); 2) If you're building a character, farm their attribute-specific materials; 3) Complete daily commissions first (they also consume stamina); 4) During limited events, prioritize event domains. Don't waste stamina on low-level materials that can be obtained through other means later.

question: 异环新手推荐培养哪些角色？
questionEn: Which characters should beginners build in NTE?
answer: 新手推荐培养方向：1) 娜娜莉（S级/生命属性）— 强力的近战输出角色，前期开荒体验好；2) 咲里（S级/咒术属性）— 优秀的支援角色，能为全队提供增益；3) 爱德勒（S级）— 输出能力出色。A级角色中也有性价比很高的选择，如智（A级）培养成本低但实用性高。建议集中资源培养2-3个核心角色，不要分散资源。
answerEn: Recommended characters for beginners: 1) Nanally (S-rank/Anima) - Strong melee DPS, great for early game; 2) Sakiri (S-rank/Incantation) - Excellent support character with team-wide buffs; 3) Adler (S-rank) - Outstanding damage output. Among A-rank characters, Chiz offers great value with low investment. Focus resources on 2-3 core characters rather than spreading thin.

question: 异环怎么快速获得经验？
questionEn: How to get experience quickly in NTE?
answer: 快速获取角色经验的途径：1) 完成主线任务和支线任务，这是前期经验的主要来源；2) 每日委托任务；3) 刷经验副本（如果有的话）；4) 探索世界、开启传送点和宝箱也有经验奖励。角色升级需要消耗猎手指南和信用点，建议同步积累这些资源。
answerEn: Ways to get character EXP quickly: 1) Main story and side quests are the primary EXP source early on; 2) Daily commissions; 3) EXP domains (if available); 4) Exploring the world, unlocking waypoints, and opening chests also grants EXP. Character leveling requires Hunter Guides and Credits, so accumulate these resources alongside EXP.

question: 异环测试版和正式版数据有区别吗？
questionEn: Is there a difference between NTE test version and official version data?
answer: 异环在测试期间，游戏数据（包括角色属性、材料需求、副本掉落等）可能会在正式上线时进行调整。本站数据基于测试版本整理，正式版上线后我们会尽快更新。建议关注游戏官方公告了解最新变动。
answerEn: During the testing period, game data (including character stats, material requirements, domain drops, etc.) may be adjusted before official launch. Our data is based on the test version and will be updated as quickly as possible after official release. Follow official announcements for the latest changes.

question: 异环技能升级材料怎么获取？
questionEn: How to get skill upgrade materials in NTE?
answer: 技能升级材料（教材类）主要通过以下方式获取：1) 属性对应的材料副本；2) 活动奖励；3) 商店兑换。攻击教材、防御教材等不同类型的教材对应不同属性的技能升级需求。建议根据要培养的角色属性，有针对性地刷取对应属性的教材。
answerEn: Skill upgrade materials (Manuals) can be obtained through: 1) Attribute-specific material domains; 2) Event rewards; 3) Shop exchange. Attack Manuals, Defense Manuals, and other types correspond to different attribute skill upgrade needs. Focus on farming manuals that match your characters' attributes.

question: 娜娜莉值得培养吗？
questionEn: Is Nanally worth building in NTE?
answer: 娜娜莉是S级生命属性格斗角色，非常值得培养。她拥有强大的近战输出能力，反重力技能在战斗中非常实用。作为初始可用的高品质角色之一，娜娜莉在前期开荒和后期高难内容中都有出色的表现。推荐作为首个重点培养的角色。
answerEn: Nanally is an S-rank Anima Fangs and Claws character, very worth building. She has powerful melee damage output and her anti-gravity skills are very practical in combat. As one of the first available high-quality characters, Nanally performs excellently in both early exploration and late-game challenges. Recommended as your first priority build.

question: 咲里值得培养吗？
questionEn: Is Sakiri worth building in NTE?
answer: 咲里是S级咒术属性支援角色，强烈推荐培养。她能为队友提供增益效果，是多种队伍配置中的核心支援。咲里的伴生体桐丸也会参与战斗，提供额外的输出能力。如果你需要一个能提升全队战斗效率的角色，咲里是最佳选择之一。
answerEn: Sakiri is an S-rank Incantation support character, highly recommended. She provides buffs to teammates and is a core support in many team compositions. Her companion Kiroumaru also participates in combat, adding extra damage. If you need a character that boosts overall team efficiency, Sakiri is one of the best choices.

question: 异环许可证明怎么获取？
questionEn: How to get Permit materials in NTE?
answer: 许可证明是角色高等级阶段升级的必需材料，分为先锋许可、专家许可和大帅许可三个等级。获取途径：1) 高等级材料副本掉落；2) 活动商店兑换；3) 部分成就奖励。许可证明是后期养成中比较稀缺的资源，建议合理规划使用。
answerEn: Permits are essential materials for high-level character upgrades, available in three tiers: Pioneer, Expert, and Master Permits. Obtained through: 1) High-level material domain drops; 2) Event shop exchange; 3) Some achievement rewards. Permits are relatively scarce resources in late-game progression, so plan their usage carefully.

question: 法蒂亚值得培养吗？
questionEn: Is Fadia worth building in NTE?
answer: 法蒂亚是S级角色，在队伍中可以担当重要输出位。她的技能机制独特，在合适的队伍配置下能发挥很高的伤害。如果你喜欢她的战斗风格，或者需要一个强力的输出角色来补充队伍配置，法蒂亚是值得投入资源培养的。
answerEn: Fadia is an S-rank character who can serve as a key DPS in your team. Her skill mechanics are unique and can deal high damage with proper team composition. If you enjoy her playstyle or need a strong damage dealer to round out your team, Fadia is worth investing resources into.

question: 异环队伍怎么搭配？
questionEn: How to build a team composition in NTE?
answer: 异环队伍搭配的基本原则：1) 属性覆盖 — 尽量覆盖多种属性以应对不同弱点的敌人；2) 角色定位 — 通常需要1个输出位、1个支援位、1个副输出/防御位；3) 属性克制 — 根据敌人弱点调整上阵角色；4) 综合考虑 — 咲里作为通用支援几乎适用于任何队伍。新手建议培养一个核心输出（如娜娜莉）+ 一个支援（如咲里）作为基础队伍。
answerEn: Basic team composition principles in NTE: 1) Attribute coverage - cover multiple attributes to handle different enemy weaknesses; 2) Role balance - typically 1 main DPS, 1 support, and 1 sub-DPS/defender; 3) Exploit weaknesses - adjust your lineup based on enemy weaknesses; 4) Sakiri works as a universal support in almost any team. Beginners should build a core DPS (like Nanally) + support (like Sakiri) as a foundation.

question: 异环体力系统是怎么运作的？
questionEn: How does the stamina system work in NTE?
answer: 异环的体力（树脂）系统与其他同类游戏类似：1) 体力有上限，随时间自然恢复（通常每8分钟恢复1点）；2) 刷材料副本需要消耗体力；3) 体力溢出时会停止恢复，建议及时使用；4) 可以使用原晶等付费货币补充体力。合理规划体力使用是高效养成的关键。
answerEn: NTE's stamina system works similarly to other games in the genre: 1) Stamina has a cap and regenerates over time (usually 1 point per 8 minutes); 2) Running material domains consumes stamina; 3) Excess stamina stops regenerating, so use it promptly; 4) Premium currency can be used to refill stamina. Planning stamina usage wisely is key to efficient progression.

question: 智值得培养吗？
questionEn: Is Chiz worth building in NTE?
answer: 智是A级角色，虽然稀有度低于S级角色，但培养成本更低，性价比很高。A级角色在合理培养和装备搭配下，完全可以胜任大部分游戏内容。如果你是新手玩家，资源有限，培养智是一个经济实惠的选择。
answerEn: Chiz is an A-rank character. While her rarity is lower than S-rank characters, she costs less to build and offers great value. A-rank characters can handle most game content with proper builds and equipment. If you're a new player with limited resources, building Chiz is an economical choice.

question: 异环首领材料怎么获取？
questionEn: How to get boss materials in NTE?
answer: 首领材料（如生命守护者等）是高等级角色升级的关键材料。获取途径：1) 挑战对应属性的首领副本，每周有次数限制；2) 限时活动期间可能开放首领副本的无限制挑战；3) 部分特殊商店可以用其他材料兑换。首领材料是养成中的瓶颈资源，建议优先分配给你最核心的角色。
answerEn: Boss materials (like Anima Guardian) are key materials for high-level character upgrades. Obtained through: 1) Challenging attribute-specific boss domains with weekly attempt limits; 2) Unlimited boss challenges may be available during limited events; 3) Some special shops allow exchanging other materials for boss materials. Boss materials are a progression bottleneck, so prioritize them for your core characters.

question: 爱德勒值得培养吗？
questionEn: Is Adler worth building in NTE?
answer: 爱德勒是S级角色，拥有出色的输出能力。作为S级角色，他的基础属性和技能倍率都较高，在高难内容中表现突出。如果你获得了爱德勒，推荐作为主力输出角色进行培养。
answerEn: Adler is an S-rank character with excellent damage output. As an S-rank character, his base stats and skill multipliers are high, making him stand out in challenging content. If you've obtained Adler, he's recommended as a main DPS character to invest in.

question: 异环怎么下载？支持哪些平台？
questionEn: How to download NTE? What platforms are supported?
answer: 异环支持多平台游玩，下载方式如下：1) 手机端（Android/iOS）：通过各应用商店搜索「异环」下载，或前往完美世界官网扫码下载；2) PC端：前往异环官网 nte.perfectworld.com 下载PC客户端启动器，通过启动器安装游戏；3) 模拟器：可以使用雷电模拟器、MuMu模拟器等在电脑上运行手游版本。建议优先通过官方渠道下载，避免第三方来源的安全风险。
answerEn: NTE supports multiple platforms: 1) Mobile (Android/iOS): Search "NTE" in your app store or scan the QR code on the official website; 2) PC: Download the PC client launcher from the official website (nte.perfectworld.com); 3) Emulators: You can use LDPlayer, MuMu, or other emulators to run the mobile version on PC. Always download from official channels to ensure security.

question: 异环手机和PC配置要求是什么？
questionEn: What are the system requirements for NTE on mobile and PC?
answer: 异环的配置要求因平台而异。手机端：Android建议骁龙845及以上处理器，6GB以上运存，10GB以上存储空间；iOS建议iPhone XS及以上机型，系统版本iOS 14以上。PC端：建议Intel i5-8400或同等级CPU，8GB以上运存，GTX 1060或以上显卡，SSD硬盘。实际配置可能因版本更新有所调整，请关注官方公告获取最新配置要求。如果手机配置不足，可以通过PC客户端或模拟器来获得更流畅的体验。
answerEn: NTE's system requirements vary by platform. Mobile: Android Snapdragon 845+ recommended, 6GB+ RAM, 10GB+ storage; iOS iPhone XS or newer, iOS 14+. PC: Intel i5-8400 or equivalent, 8GB+ RAM, GTX 1060 or better, SSD recommended. Requirements may change with updates, so check official announcements for the latest specs. If your phone doesn't meet requirements, consider using the PC client or an emulator for a smoother experience.

question: 异环什么时候公测/上线？
questionEn: When does NTE officially launch?
answer: 异环目前仍在测试阶段，具体公测时间以官方公告为准。游戏已完成多次测试（包括共存测试），预注册人数已超过3000万。建议关注异环官方社交媒体（微博、B站、TapTap）或官网 yh.wanmei.com 获取最新的上线信息。测试期间的数据（角色属性、材料需求等）可能会在正式上线时有所调整。
answerEn: NTE is currently in the testing phase. The exact official launch date will be announced by the developers. The game has completed multiple tests including the Coexistence Test, with pre-registrations exceeding 30 million. Follow NTE's official social media (Weibo, Bilibili, TapTap) or the official website for the latest launch information. Game data during testing may be adjusted before official release.

question: 异环怎么参加测试？
questionEn: How to participate in NTE beta tests?
answer: 参加异环测试的方式：1) 前往官网 yh.wanmei.com 或 TapTap 页面预约/报名测试资格；2) 关注官方社交媒体，测试开放时会发布招募公告；3) 部分测试会通过抽签方式发放资格。获得资格后，按照官方指引下载测试客户端即可参与。注意测试数据通常不会保留到正式版。
answerEn: To participate in NTE beta tests: 1) Register on the official website or TapTap page; 2) Follow official social media for test recruitment announcements; 3) Some tests distribute access through lottery. Once selected, download the test client following official instructions. Note that test data usually does not carry over to the official release.

question: 异环预注册/预约奖励有哪些？
questionEn: What are the NTE pre-registration rewards?
answer: 异环的预注册里程碑奖励根据总预约人数解锁，目前已解锁的奖励包括：原晶、信用点、猎手指南、抽卡券等珍贵资源。预注册人数越多，解锁的奖励越丰富。建议尽早前往官网或TapTap完成预约，确保在公测时能领取全部奖励。奖励通常通过游戏内邮件发放。
answerEn: NTE's pre-registration milestone rewards unlock based on total registration count. Currently unlocked rewards include: Original Crystals, Credits, Hunter Guides, gacha tickets, and other valuable resources. The more pre-registrations, the richer the rewards. Register early on the official website or TapTap to ensure you receive all rewards at launch. Rewards are typically distributed via in-game mail.

question: 异环保底机制是怎样的？
questionEn: How does the pity system work in NTE?
answer: 异环公测前瞻直播已确认：抽卡保底机制没有50/50。限定角色池90抽硬保底，触发保底时100%获得当期UP的限定S级角色，不存在「歪」到常驻角色的情况。平均出货约53.5抽，从第74抽开始触发软保底。新手池20抽必出S级且可自选，常驻池50抽可自选S级，武器池80抽保底UP武器。保底次数在同类型卡池之间会继承。这是目前二次元游戏中最为友好的抽卡系统之一。
answerEn: NTE launch livestream confirmed: no 50/50 in the pity system. Limited character banner has 90-pull hard pity, with 100% rate for the featured S-rank character when pity triggers — no off-banner characters. Average ~53.5 pulls, soft pity from pull 74. Beginner banner: 20-pull guaranteed S-rank with selector. Standard banner: 50-pull S-rank selector. Weapon banner: 80-pull featured weapon pity. Pity carries over between same-type banners. One of the most player-friendly gacha systems in anime games.

question: 异环新手应该优先抽什么卡池？
questionEn: Which banner should beginners pull first in NTE?
answer: 新手抽卡优先级建议：1) 优先抽取角色限定池，确保获得一个强力的S级核心输出（如娜娜莉、爱德勒等）；2) 如果新手池有折扣抽卡（如前10抽半价或免费），务必先用完新手池机会；3) 有了核心角色后再考虑常驻池补齐阵容；4) 武器池建议在有2-3个主力角色后再投入。注意保留一定的原晶用于未来限定角色。
answerEn: Recommended pull priority for beginners: 1) Pull the limited character banner first to secure a strong S-rank DPS (like Nanally or Adler); 2) If there's a discounted beginner banner, use it first; 3) After getting a core character, consider the standard banner to round out your roster; 4) Weapon banners should wait until you have 2-3 main characters built. Save some Original Crystals for future limited characters.

question: 异环抽卡用什么货币？怎么获取？
questionEn: What currency is used for gacha in NTE and how to get it?
answer: 异环抽卡主要使用原晶（付费/免费）和抽卡券。原晶获取途径：1) 完成主线任务和支线任务；2) 探索开放世界、开启宝箱；3) 每日委托任务奖励；4) 深渊/高难挑战奖励；5) 活动奖励；6) 直接充值购买。抽卡券可通过活动、成就和商店兑换获得。免费原晶足够支持每版本有限度抽卡，合理规划很重要。
answerEn: NTE gacha primarily uses Original Crystals (paid/free) and gacha tickets. Ways to get Original Crystals: 1) Main/side quest completion; 2) Open world exploration and treasure chests; 3) Daily commission rewards; 4) Endgame/challenge rewards; 5) Event rewards; 6) Direct purchase. Gacha tickets can be obtained from events, achievements, and shop exchanges. Free crystals support limited pulls each version, so plan wisely.

question: 异环极限闪避怎么触发？有什么效果？
questionEn: How to trigger Perfect Dodge in NTE? What are the effects?
answer: 极限闪避是异环战斗中的核心技巧。触发方式：在敌人攻击出现红色闪光预警的瞬间按下闪避键，即可触发极限闪避。触发效果：1) 短暂无敌帧，规避所有伤害；2) 获得增伤效果，提高后续攻击的伤害；3) 快速积累倾陷值（破防条），加速敌人进入破防状态。建议在实战中多练习闪避节奏，善用极限闪避可以大幅提升战斗效率。
answerEn: Perfect Dodge is a core combat mechanic in NTE. How to trigger: Press dodge the moment an enemy attack shows a red flash warning. Effects: 1) Brief invincibility frames to avoid all damage; 2) Damage boost for subsequent attacks; 3) Rapidly builds Break gauge to stun enemies faster. Practice the dodge timing in combat — mastering Perfect Dodge significantly improves combat efficiency.

question: 异环环合爆发怎么用？
questionEn: How to use Chain Burst in NTE?
answer: 环合爆发是异环的核心战斗系统之一。使用方法：1) 通过普攻和技能攻击积累环合值；2) 当环合值充满后，切换到对应属性的队友即可触发环合爆发；3) 环合爆发会对敌人造成大量范围伤害。推荐的属性搭配：光+灵（创生）属性组合可以触发自动范围爆炸，适合清群怪。合理规划队伍的属性搭配和切换顺序，是掌握环合爆发的关键。
answerEn: Chain Burst is a core combat system in NTE. How to use: 1) Build up Chain gauge through normal attacks and skills; 2) When the gauge is full, switch to a teammate with the matching attribute to trigger Chain Burst; 3) Chain Burst deals massive AoE damage. Recommended combo: Light + Spirit attribute combination triggers automatic AoE explosions, ideal for clearing groups. Planning your team's attribute composition and switch order is key to mastering Chain Bursts.

question: 异环战斗有什么技巧？
questionEn: What are some combat tips for NTE?
answer: 异环战斗的核心技巧：1) 善用极限闪避 — 敌人红光预警时闪避触发无敌+增伤+破防积累；2) 属性克制 — 观察敌人属性弱点，切换对应属性角色可造成约1.5倍额外伤害；3) 环合爆发 — 普攻攒满环合值后切队友触发强力范围攻击；4) 属性搭配 — 光+灵（创生）组合适合清群怪；5) 连携技能 — 合理利用角色切换时的连携效果；6) 走位拉扯 — 不要站桩输出，利用移动规避伤害。
answerEn: Core combat tips for NTE: 1) Master Perfect Dodge — dodge during red flash warnings for invincibility + damage boost; 2) Exploit attribute weaknesses — switch to matching attribute characters for ~1.5x bonus damage; 3) Chain Bursts — build gauge and switch teammates for powerful AoE attacks; 4) Attribute combos — Light + Spirit combination excels at clearing groups; 5) Chain skills — utilize character switch combo effects; 6) Keep moving — don't stand still, use movement to avoid damage.

question: 异环海特洛市怎么探索？
questionEn: How to explore Hethereau City in NTE?
answer: 海特洛市是异环的主要开放世界区域，探索要点：1) 区域解锁 — 跟随主线任务逐步解锁新城区、桥间地、绘空町等区域；2) 收集品 — 注意收集乌鸦玉石等隐藏物品，它们通常在巷子深处、高处平台或需要解谜才能到达的位置；3) 传送点 — 优先激活各区域的传送点，方便后续快速移动；4) 互动元素 — 快递柜、隐藏宝箱等互动要素分布在城市各处；5) 敌人清理 — 清理区域内的敌人可以获得探索度和奖励。
answerEn: Hethereau City is NTE's main open world area. Exploration tips: 1) Area unlocking — Follow the main story to unlock New District, Hashikama, and other areas; 2) Collectibles — Look for Crow Jade and hidden items in alleys, high platforms, and puzzle-locked areas; 3) Waypoints — Activate waypoints first for quick travel; 4) Interactive elements — Check lockers, hidden chests, and other interactable objects throughout the city; 5) Enemy encounters — Clear enemies in each area for exploration progress and rewards.

question: 异环乌鸦玉石怎么获取？有什么用？
questionEn: How to get Crow Jade in NTE? What is it used for?
answer: 乌鸦玉石是海特洛市中散落的收集品，获取方式：1) 在城市的巷子深处、高处平台、隐藏角落等位置寻找；2) 部分乌鸦玉石需要完成特定解谜或挑战才能获取；3) 探索地图时注意观察发光提示。乌鸦玉石的用途：收集足够数量的乌鸦玉石可以兑换稀有奖励，包括原晶、抽卡券和特殊材料。建议在探索每个新区域时留意收集。
answerEn: Crow Jade is a collectible scattered throughout Hethereau City. How to find: 1) Look in deep alleys, high platforms, and hidden corners; 2) Some require solving puzzles or completing challenges; 3) Watch for glowing hints while exploring. Uses: Collecting enough Crow Jade can be exchanged for rare rewards including Original Crystals, gacha tickets, and special materials. Make sure to collect them as you explore each new area.

question: 异环隐藏区域怎么进入？
questionEn: How to access hidden areas in NTE?
answer: 异环的隐藏区域有多种进入方式：1) 解谜 — 部分隐藏区域需要完成特定的机关解谜才能开启入口；2) 爬墙翻越 — 利用角色的攀爬能力到达看似不可到达的区域；3) 特定任务 — 有些隐藏区域需要完成前置任务才会解锁；4) 时间/天气触发 — 少数区域在特定时间或天气条件下才会出现入口。探索时多观察环境，留意可疑的墙壁、裂缝或发光标记。
answerEn: NTE's hidden areas can be accessed through various methods: 1) Puzzles — Some areas require completing specific mechanisms to open; 2) Climbing — Use character climbing abilities to reach seemingly inaccessible areas; 3) Quest requirements — Certain areas unlock only after completing prerequisite quests; 4) Time/weather triggers — A few areas only appear under specific conditions. Look for suspicious walls, cracks, or glowing markers while exploring.

question: 异环觉醒系统是什么？怎么解锁？
questionEn: What is the Awakening system in NTE? How to unlock it?
answer: 觉醒系统是异环中角色进阶的重要机制。当角色达到一定等级后，可以消耗特定材料进行觉醒，大幅提升角色的基础属性和技能效果。觉醒通常分为多个阶段，每个阶段需要不同的材料组合。觉醒后角色的外观可能会有变化，部分技能会获得强化效果。建议优先为核心输出角色进行觉醒，收益最大。
answerEn: The Awakening system is an important character advancement mechanic in NTE. When a character reaches a certain level, you can consume specific materials to Awaken them, significantly boosting base stats and skill effects. Awakening has multiple stages, each requiring different material combinations. Awakened characters may have visual changes and enhanced skills. Prioritize awakening your core DPS characters for maximum benefit.

question: 异环异象委托怎么做？
questionEn: How to complete Anomaly Commissions in NTE?
answer: 异象委托是异环中的日常/周常任务系统。完成方法：1) 在主界面或地图上查看当前可接取的异象委托；2) 前往指定地点，按照任务指引完成战斗或探索目标；3) 部分委托需要特定的角色属性才能高效完成；4) 完成后获得信用点、材料和经验等奖励。建议每天优先完成高优先级的委托，确保不遗漏稀有奖励。
answerEn: Anomaly Commissions are daily/weekly tasks in NTE. How to complete: 1) Check available commissions from the main screen or map; 2) Go to the designated location and complete combat or exploration objectives; 3) Some commissions benefit from specific character attributes; 4) Turn in for Credits, materials, and EXP rewards. Prioritize high-value commissions daily to avoid missing rare rewards.

question: 异环异能有哪些类型？
questionEn: What types of Esper abilities are there in NTE?
answer: 异环中的异能（角色属性）分为六种类型：1) 生命（Anima）— 自然与生命之力，代表角色如娜娜莉；2) 咒术（Incantation）— 符咒与结界之力，代表角色如咲里；3) 混沌（Chaos）— 混乱与破坏之力；4) 灵魂（Psyche）— 精神与心灵之力；5) 宇宙（Cosmos）— 星辰与空间之力；6) 相（Lakshana）— 特殊的属性类型。不同属性之间存在克制关系，合理搭配属性是战斗的关键。
answerEn: NTE has six attribute types (Esper abilities): 1) Anima — Life force, represented by characters like Nanally; 2) Incantation — Seals and barriers, represented by Sakiri; 3) Chaos — Destruction power; 4) Psyche — Mental and spiritual power; 5) Cosmos — Stellar and spatial power; 6) Lakshana — A special attribute type. Different attributes have weakness relationships, and proper attribute combinations are key to combat success.

question: 异环磁盘系统怎么玩？
questionEn: How does the Disk system work in NTE?
answer: 磁盘系统是异环的装备系统，类似于其他游戏中的圣遗物/遗器系统。玩法要点：1) 每个角色可以装备多个磁盘，分为不同部位；2) 磁盘有主属性和副属性，稀有度越高属性越好；3) 同一套装的磁盘组合可以激活套装效果，提供额外加成；4) 磁盘通过挑战特定副本获取；5) 可以消耗材料强化磁盘，提升属性值。建议前期先用高星散件过渡，后期再追求完美套装。
answerEn: The Disk system is NTE's equipment system, similar to artifacts in other games. Key points: 1) Each character can equip multiple disks in different slots; 2) Disks have main stats and sub-stats, with higher rarity offering better stats; 3) Matching set bonuses activate when equipping disks from the same set; 4) Disks are obtained from specific domain challenges; 5) Disks can be enhanced with materials to increase stats. Use high-star individual pieces early on, then aim for complete sets later.

question: 异环武器怎么强化？
questionEn: How to upgrade weapons in NTE?
answer: 异环武器强化系统：1) 武器可以通过消耗材料进行升级，提升基础攻击力；2) 每把武器有等级上限，达到上限后需要突破才能继续升级；3) 武器突破需要特定的突破材料，通常通过材料副本获取；4) 武器有被动技能，在特定等级节点解锁或强化；5) 武器分为不同稀有度（如S级、A级），稀有度越高上限越高。建议优先强化主力角色的武器，资源有限时不要分散投入。
answerEn: NTE weapon upgrade system: 1) Weapons are upgraded by consuming materials to increase base attack; 2) Each weapon has a level cap that requires ascension to exceed; 3) Ascension requires specific materials from material domains; 4) Weapons have passive skills that unlock or improve at certain level thresholds; 5) Weapons come in different rarities (S-rank, A-rank), with higher rarity having higher caps. Prioritize upgrading weapons for your main characters — don't spread resources thin.

question: 异环兑换码怎么使用？有哪些兑换码？
questionEn: How to use redeem codes in NTE? What codes are available?
answer: 异环兑换码使用方法：1) 在游戏主界面找到设置或个人中心入口；2) 找到「兑换码」或「礼包兑换」选项；3) 输入有效的兑换码即可领取奖励。兑换码通常通过以下渠道发布：官方社交媒体（微博、B站）、直播活动、合作平台（TapTap）、线下活动等。兑换码有使用期限和次数限制，建议及时使用。我们网站的兑换码页面会持续更新最新的有效兑换码。
answerEn: How to use redeem codes in NTE: 1) Find Settings or Profile in the main menu; 2) Look for the "Redeem Code" or "Gift Exchange" option; 3) Enter a valid code to claim rewards. Codes are distributed through: official social media (Weibo, Bilibili), livestream events, partner platforms (TapTap), and offline events. Codes have expiration dates and usage limits, so use them promptly. Our site's redeem codes page is updated with the latest valid codes.

question: 异环新手开局怎么玩？
questionEn: How should beginners start NTE?
answer: 异环新手开局攻略：1) 跟随主线任务推进，优先了解游戏基本操作和系统；2) 抽卡方面，优先用完新手池折扣机会，获取第一个S级核心角色；3) 角色培养集中资源培养1个主力输出+1个支援，推荐娜娜莉（输出）+咲里（支援）的组合；4) 体力优先刷角色升级材料，不要浪费在低级材料上；5) 每日必做：委托任务、体力清空、领取活动奖励；6) 探索地图时优先激活传送点，方便后续刷材料。记住前期不要贪多，集中资源是关键。
answerEn: Beginner's guide for starting NTE: 1) Follow the main story to learn basic controls and systems; 2) For gacha, use beginner banner discounts first to get your first S-rank core character; 3) Focus resources on 1 main DPS + 1 support, recommend Nanally + Sakiri; 4) Prioritize stamina on character leveling materials, not low-level ones; 5) Daily must-dos: commissions, use all stamina, claim event rewards; 6) Activate waypoints first when exploring for easier material farming. Don't spread resources thin in early game.

question: 异环2026年什么时候公测？具体上线日期是几号？
questionEn: When does NTE launch in 2026? What is the exact release date?
answer: 异环国服（中国大陆）已确认于2026年4月23日正式公测上线，国际服（全球）于2026年4月29日上线，预下载4月21日开放。游戏由完美世界旗下Hotta Studio开发，支持PC、Android、iOS、Mac、HarmonyOS和PlayStation 5多平台游玩，全平台数据互通。公测前瞻特别节目已于4月18日19:30在B站、TapTap、YouTube等平台播出，公布了6个兑换码、抽卡机制和16位上线角色等关键信息。
answerEn: NTE Chinese server launches April 23, 2026 (confirmed). Global server launches April 29. Pre-download opens April 21. Developed by Hotta Studio (Perfect World), supporting PC, Android, iOS, Mac, HarmonyOS, and PS5 with full cross-platform data sharing. The launch preview livestream aired April 18 at 19:30 Beijing Time on Bilibili, TapTap, and YouTube, revealing 6 redeem codes, gacha mechanics, and the 16-character launch roster.

question: 异环预下载什么时候开始？怎么提前下载？
questionEn: When does NTE pre-download start? How to download early?
answer: 异环公测预下载已确认为2026年4月21日开放。PC端可通过官网（yh.wanmei.com）或Epic Games Store下载客户端启动器，移动端可在App Store和Google Play预约自动下载。PC端游戏文件约25-30GB，移动端约8-10GB。NVIDIA用户建议更新至596.21 WHQL驱动以获得最佳体验。建议使用WiFi提前下载避免开服当天服务器拥堵。预下载完成后，4月23日开服即可直接进入游戏。
answerEn: NTE pre-download confirmed for April 21, 2026. PC: download via official website (yh.wanmei.com) or Epic Games Store. Mobile: pre-order on App Store/Google Play. PC file size ~25-30GB, mobile ~8-10GB. NVIDIA users should update to driver 596.21 WHQL for optimal performance. Download early via WiFi to avoid launch-day congestion. Once downloaded, enter the game immediately when servers open on April 23.

seoDescriptionZh: 异环国际服4月29日正式上线！详解国服与国际服区别、开服时间、预下载安排、兑换码差异及服务器选择建议。
seoDescriptionEn: NTE global server launches April 29. Complete comparison of CN vs Global servers: launch schedule, pre-download, redeem codes, language support, and pricing differences.
answer: 异环国服4月23日正式上线，国际服4月29日正式上线（前瞻直播确认）。预下载4月21日开放。两个版本的主要区别：1) 进度：国服比国际服早6天开服；2) 兑换码不同：直播共发放6组兑换码，国服3组（YH开头）和国际服3组（NTE开头），各自仅能在对应服务器使用；3) 语言：国服简体中文，国际服英文/日文等多语言；4) 定价可能因地区而异。游戏内容和角色数据在两个服务器之间是一致的，开服共有16位S级角色。

Game content and character data are identical across servers, with 16 S-rank characters available at launch.

question: 异环国服和国际服有什么区别？选哪个好？
questionEn: What's the difference between NTE CN and Global servers? Which should I play?
answer: 异环国服和国际服的主要区别：1) 上线时间 — 国服4月23日，国际服4月29日；2) 服务器 — 数据不互通，角色和进度无法跨服迁移；3) 语言 — 国服以简体中文为主，国际服支持英语、日语、韩语等多语言；4) 活动节奏 — 国际服比国服滞后1-2个版本；5) 付费 — 定价基础一致，按当地货币换算；6) 社交 — 好友和公会仅限同一服务器。建议选择和你朋友相同的服务器，以及地理位置最近的服务器以获得最佳网络延迟。
answerEn: Key differences between CN and Global servers: 1) Launch date — CN on April 23, Global on April 29; 2) Servers — data does not transfer between regions; 3) Language — CN is Simplified Chinese, Global supports English, Japanese, Korean, and more; 4) Content pace — Global trails CN by 1-2 versions; 5) Pricing — base prices are consistent, converted to local currency; 6) Social — friends and guilds are server-specific. Choose the server your friends play on and the closest to your location for best latency.

question: 异环公测总共能白嫖多少抽？免费资源有多少？
questionEn: How many free pulls can I get at NTE launch? Total free resources?
answer: 根据4月18日前瞻直播确认，异环公测总共提供约418次免费祈愿机会，具体来源分布为：前瞻直播兑换码约18抽（3个国服码+3个国际服码）、预注册奖励约40抽、新手池免费20抽（含S级自选）、常驻池50抽S级自选券、公测限时活动约80抽、主线+支线任务约100抽、开放世界探索约40抽（宝箱/成就等）、每日每周任务约20抽。此外还有S级小吱可通过都市大亨模式免费获取，以及A级新角色奥蕾莉亚。这个数量远超同类游戏开服福利水平，零氪玩家也能组建强力队伍。
answerEn: According to the April 18 livestream, NTE launch provides approximately 418 free pulls total, with the following breakdown: livestream redeem codes (~18 pulls from 3 CN + 3 Global codes), pre-registration milestone rewards (~40 pulls), beginner banner 20 free pulls (with S-rank selector), standard banner 50-pull S-rank selector ticket, launch limited-time events (~80 pulls), main + side story quests (~100 pulls), open world exploration (~40 pulls from chests/achievements), and daily/weekly tasks (~20 pulls). Additionally, S-rank Xiaozhi is free from City Tycoon mode, and A-rank Aurelia is a new launch character. This far exceeds typical gacha game launch rewards — F2P players can easily build a strong team.

question: 异环支持跨平台吗？数据互通吗？
questionEn: Does NTE support cross-platform play and cross-save?
answer: 异环支持全平台数据互通和跨平台游玩。你可以在PC、Android、iOS、Mac、HarmonyOS和PlayStation 5之间自由切换，游戏进度、角色和物品数据完全同步。这意味着你可以在家用PC端高画质体验，出门用手机继续同样的进度。需要注意的是，不同区域的服务器（如国服、亚洲服、美洲服、欧洲服）之间数据不互通。此外，部分付费货币可能因平台政策限制而无法跨平台使用（如iOS购买的货币在Android上可能不可用）。
answerEn: NTE supports full cross-platform play and cross-save across PC, Android, iOS, Mac, HarmonyOS, and PlayStation 5. Your game progress, characters, and items sync completely between platforms — play on PC at home and continue on mobile on the go. Note that different regional servers (CN, Asia, Americas, Europe) do not share data. Additionally, some premium currencies may have platform-specific restrictions due to platform policies (e.g., currencies purchased on iOS may not be usable on Android).
