seoDescriptionZh: 异环(NTE)各平台下载大小汇总：PC版约40GB，手机版约15GB。包含存储空间需求、下载安装指南和预下载时间。
seoDescriptionEn: NTE download size: ~40GB for PC, ~15GB for mobile. Complete guide to storage requirements, download links, and pre-download schedule for all platforms.
answer: 根据前瞻直播确认，异环预下载将于4月21日开放。预计PC版下载大小约30-40GB（含高清资源包），手机版（Android/iOS）约15-20GB。建议PC玩家预留至少60GB存储空间（含后续更新），手机玩家预留30GB以上。预下载完成后，国服4月23日、国际服4月29日开服时只需下载小量更新包即可进入游戏。建议提前预下载避免开服当天下载拥堵。
answerEn: Pre-download starts April 21 (confirmed by livestream). Expected download size is approximately 30-40GB for PC (including HD assets) and 15-20GB for mobile (Android/iOS). We recommend reserving at least 60GB for PC (including future updates) and 30GB+ for mobile. After pre-downloading, you will only need a small update patch on launch day — April 23 for CN server, April 29 for Global server. Pre-downloading early is recommended to avoid server congestion on launch day.

question: 异环是免费游戏吗？需要花钱吗？
questionEn: Is NTE free to play? Do I need to spend money?
answer: 异环是一款完全免费下载和游玩的游戏，采用免费+内购的模式。所有核心玩法内容（主线剧情、开放世界探索、副本挑战等）都可以免费体验。内购项目主要包括：抽卡资源（获取角色和武器）、月卡（每日领取资源）、通行证（任务奖励）、外观道具等。零氪玩家通过日常积累完全可以获得充足的游戏资源，每个版本约可积攒60-80抽。公测1.0版本零氪玩家预计可获得约418次免费抽卡机会。游戏不强制消费，付费主要是加速获取角色和外观。
answerEn: NTE is completely free to download and play, using a free-to-play with optional in-app purchases model. All core content — main story, open world exploration, dungeon challenges — is accessible without spending money. In-app purchases include gacha resources (for characters and weapons), monthly pass (daily resources), battle pass (task rewards), and cosmetics. F2P players can accumulate sufficient resources through regular play, earning approximately 60-80 pulls per version. Version 1.0 offers roughly 418 free pulls for F2P players. The game never forces spending — payments mainly accelerate character acquisition and cosmetics.

question: 异环抽卡有50/50吗？保底会歪吗？
questionEn: Does NTE have a 50/50 system? Can pity give off-banner characters?
answer: 好消息！异环公测确认没有50/50机制。这是4月18日前瞻直播中官方正式宣布的重磅消息。在限定祈愿池中，抽到S级角色时100%是当期UP角色，不会出现"歪"到常驻角色的情况。这意味着你每抽到一个S级，就一定是卡面上展示的角色，不需要担心保底歪掉浪费资源。保底为90抽硬保底，74抽开始进入软保底区间，平均约53.5抽出一个S级。这一机制使异环成为目前最友好的抽卡游戏之一，大幅降低了获取心仪角色的成本。
answerEn: Great news! NTE has officially confirmed there is NO 50/50 system — this was a major announcement from the April 18 livestream. In the limited character banner, every S-rank pull is 100% guaranteed to be the featured character. You will never lose your pity to a standard pool character. This means every S-rank you pull is exactly the one shown on the banner. Hard pity is 90 pulls, soft pity starts at 74, and the average cost is about 53.5 pulls per S-rank. This makes NTE one of the most generous and player-friendly gacha systems available, significantly lowering the cost of getting the characters you want.

question: 异环怎么刷初始？刷初始值得吗？
questionEn: How to reroll in NTE? Is rerolling worth it?
answer: 异环可以通过以下步骤刷初始：1) 完成新手教程；2) 使用新手池20抽获取S级角色（可自选）；3) 使用常驻池50抽S级自选券；4) 领取预注册和兑换码奖励继续抽卡。不过考虑到以下因素，刷初始的必要性大大降低：首先，异环没有50/50机制，限定池出S级100%是UP角色，你想要谁就能直接抽到谁；其次，约418次免费抽的资源量非常充足；最后，新手池和常驻池都提供S级自选，加上都市大亨模式免费送S级小吱，开服即可获得多个S级角色。建议正常游玩，利用丰富的免费资源直接获取心仪角色。
answerEn: You can reroll in NTE by: 1) Completing the tutorial; 2) Using the 20 beginner banner pulls with S-rank selector; 3) Using the standard banner 50-pull S-rank selector ticket; 4) Claiming pre-registration and redeem code rewards for more pulls. However, rerolling is much less necessary because: 1) NTE has no 50/50 system — every S-rank in the limited banner is 100% the featured character, so you get exactly who you want; 2) ~418 free pulls at launch is extremely generous; 3) Both beginner and standard banners offer S-rank selectors, plus S-rank Xiaozhi is free from City Tycoon mode. We recommend playing normally and using the abundant free resources to get your desired characters directly.

question: 异环开服6选1选谁？免费S级角色推荐
questionEn: NTE launch 6-choose-1: Which free S-rank character should I pick?
answer: 异环公测提供多个S级角色获取途径（前瞻直播确认）：1) 新手池20抽后获得S级自选券，可从常驻S级角色中选择一位；2) 常驻池累计50抽获得S级自选券；3) 都市大亨模式免费获取S级小吱。开服共有16位S级角色，其中薄荷（Mint）和早雾（Sakiri）等是热门选择。推荐优先级：如果你需要一个强力的通用进攻角色，选择早雾；如果你需要一个可靠的近战角色，选择薄荷。由于没有50/50机制，限定池角色获取有保障，自选券建议优先选择常驻池中没有的S级角色来完善队伍搭配。
answerEn: NTE launch offers multiple S-rank acquisition paths (confirmed by livestream): 1) Beginner banner selector after 20 pulls — choose from standard S-rank characters; 2) Standard banner S-rank selector ticket at 50 pulls; 3) Free S-rank Xiaozhi via City Tycoon mode. There are 16 S-rank characters at launch, with Mint and Sakiri being popular choices. Priority recommendation: Choose Sakiri for a strong versatile attacker, or Mint for a reliable melee character. Since there is no 50/50 system, limited banner characters are guaranteed — use your selector tickets on standard S-ranks you do not have yet to round out your team composition.

question: 异环零氪能玩吗？不花钱体验怎么样？
questionEn: Is NTE F2P friendly? Can I enjoy it without spending money?
answer: 异环对零氪玩家非常友好。首先，公测1.0版本零氪可获得约418次免费抽卡，足够保底2个限定S级角色加专属武器。其次，A级角色在合理培养后完全可以胜任大部分游戏内容，与S级角色的差距并不悬殊。日常玩法中，每日委托、周常任务、探索奖励和活动奖励提供稳定的资源获取渠道。月卡和通行证虽然能加速进度，但不是必需品。游戏的核心内容（主线剧情、开放世界探索、副本挑战）全部免费开放，不会设置付费墙。总体来说，零氪玩家可以获得完整且优质的游戏体验。
answerEn: NTE is very F2P-friendly. Version 1.0 provides approximately 418 free pulls — enough to guarantee 2 limited S-rank characters plus their signature weapons. A-rank characters perform well in most content when properly built, with a manageable gap compared to S-ranks. Daily commissions, weekly tasks, exploration rewards, and events provide steady resource income. Monthly pass and battle pass accelerate progress but aren't necessary. All core content — main story, open world exploration, dungeon challenges — is fully accessible without spending. F2P players can enjoy a complete and high-quality experience.

question: 异环可以联机吗？多人模式怎么玩？
questionEn: Does NTE have multiplayer/co-op? How does it work?
seoTitleZh: 异环可以联机吗？多人合作模式完整攻略（2026）
seoTitleEn: Is NTE Multiplayer? Co-op & Online Features Explained (2026)
seoDescriptionZh: 异环支持最多4人联机合作！详解联机玩法、跨平台联机、匹配系统、组队方法及联机奖励。包含协作任务、世界Boss、副本合作等多人模式介绍。
seoDescriptionEn: Yes, NTE supports up to 4-player co-op multiplayer. Complete guide to online features, cross-platform play, matchmaking, party system, co-op missions, and world boss battles.
answer:
异环支持最多4人联机合作。

【核心结论】异环是一款支持多人联机的游戏，最多4人组队合作。游戏以单人剧情探索为主，联机是重要的辅助玩法。

【联机模式介绍】
1) 协作任务 — 组队完成专门的协作挑战，奖励比单人更丰厚
2) 世界Boss挑战 — 多人协作击败强力Boss，降低战斗难度
3) 副本合作 — 部分高难副本支持多人挑战
4) 自由探索 — 可以邀请好友进入你的世界一起探索

【联机规则】
- 每队最多4人
- 宝箱和收集品获取独立（每人都能拾取，不会争抢）
- 支持实时语音和表情互动
- 匹配系统根据等级和进度智能匹配队友
- 联机时部分单人剧情可能受限

【跨平台联机】
异环支持跨平台联机，PC、Android、iOS玩家可以一起组队游戏。登录同一账号即可在不同平台间切换。

【如何组队】
1) 通过好友列表邀请好友
2) 使用匹配系统随机匹配队友
3) 在特定NPC处创建或加入队伍

【联机建议】
建议在高难度区域探索、世界Boss挑战时组队前往，可以获得更好的游戏体验和更丰厚的奖励。
answerEn:
Yes, NTE is a multiplayer game that supports up to 4-player online co-op.

Quick Answer: NTE supports multiplayer co-op for up to 4 players. While the game is primarily a single-player open-world RPG, co-op is a major feature for challenging content.

Co-op Game Modes:
1) Cooperative Missions — Team up for exclusive co-op challenges with better rewards than solo play
2) World Boss Battles — Coordinate with other players to defeat powerful bosses
3) Dungeon Co-op — Some challenging dungeons support multiplayer parties
4) Open World Exploration — Invite friends to explore your world together

Multiplayer Rules:
- Maximum party size: 4 players
- Chests and collectibles are independent per player (everyone gets their own loot)
- Real-time voice chat and emotes supported
- Smart matchmaking based on player level and progress
- Some solo story content may be restricted during co-op

Cross-Platform Play:
NTE supports cross-platform multiplayer across PC, Android, and iOS. Log in with the same account to play across different devices.

How to Team Up:
1) Invite friends from your friend list
2) Use the matchmaking system to find random teammates
3) Create or join a party at specific NPCs in-game

Does NTE have PvP?
Currently, NTE does not have PvP (player vs player) mode. The multiplayer focus is entirely on cooperative PvE content.

Is NTE an online-only game?
No, NTE can be played solo offline for most story and exploration content. However, multiplayer features and some events require an internet connection.

Tips: Team up for high-difficulty areas and world boss fights for better rewards and a more enjoyable experience.

question: 异环第一个S级角色选谁？新手推荐培养顺序
questionEn: Which S-rank should beginners choose first? Build priority
answer: 异环新手第一个S级角色推荐：首选娜娜莉（Anima属性主C）— 输出能力最强，操作简单，前期开荒和后期高难内容都表现出色。如果你通过新手池或自选券已经获得了娜娜莉，第二个推荐咲里（Incantation属性支援）— 几乎适配任何队伍的全能辅助。培养优先级建议：1) 集中资源把主C升到当前最高等级；2) 其次提升武器等级；3) 最后考虑碟片属性。技能方面优先点满主C的核心输出技能。不要同时培养太多角色，前期资源集中投入1个主C + 1个支援即可。
answerEn: Recommended first S-rank for beginners: Nanally (Anima DPS) — strongest output, simple to play, excellent from early game through endgame. If you already have Nanally, your second pick should be Sakiri (Incantation Support) — a versatile support that fits nearly any team. Build priority: 1) Focus resources to max your main DPS level; 2) Upgrade weapon level next; 3) Optimize disc stats last. Prioritize maxing your main DPS's core damage skill. Don't build too many characters simultaneously — focus on 1 main DPS + 1 support in early game.

question: 异环支持PS5吗？主机版什么时候出？
questionEn: Is NTE available on PS5? When is the console version coming?
answer: 异环确认支持PlayStation 5平台，将在PC和移动端上线后推出PS5版本。PS5版将利用主机硬件优势提供高品质的画面表现和流畅的游戏体验，支持手柄操控和触觉反馈。PS5版与PC和移动端数据互通，可以在不同平台间无缝切换。具体的PS5版上线时间请关注官方公告。除了PS5，游戏还支持PC、Android、iOS、Mac和HarmonyOS。
answerEn: NTE is confirmed for PlayStation 5. The PS5 version will launch after the PC and mobile release, leveraging console hardware for high-quality visuals and smooth gameplay with controller support and haptic feedback. PS5 data syncs with PC and mobile versions for seamless cross-platform play. Follow official announcements for the exact PS5 launch date. Beyond PS5, NTE supports PC, Android, iOS, Mac, and HarmonyOS.

question: 异环能在Mac上玩吗？Mac版怎么下载？
questionEn: Can I play NTE on Mac? How to download the Mac version?
answer: 异环确认支持Mac平台。Mac用户可以通过官网下载Mac版客户端进行游玩。由于游戏使用虚幻引擎5开发，建议使用搭载Apple Silicon（M1及以上芯片）的Mac以获得最佳性能体验。Intel芯片的Mac也可以运行，但性能可能不如Apple Silicon机型。Mac版与PC、移动端数据完全互通，游戏进度同步。具体的Mac版下载方式和配置要求，请关注官网的下载页面。
answerEn: NTE is confirmed for Mac. Mac users can download the client from the official website. Since the game uses Unreal Engine 5, Apple Silicon Macs (M1 or later) are recommended for optimal performance. Intel-based Macs can also run the game but may have lower performance. The Mac version fully syncs with PC and mobile platforms. Check the official website's download page for specific Mac system requirements and installation instructions.

question: 异环抽卡用什么货币？方斯是什么？
questionEn: What currency is used for gacha in NTE? What is Fons?
answer: 异环抽卡主要使用两种货币：原晶（付费/免费）和抽卡券。原晶是游戏中的高级货币，分为免费原晶（通过游戏内日常、任务、探索获取）和付费原晶（充值获得）两种。免费和付费原晶在抽卡时等价使用，但部分限定商品可能只能用付费原晶购买。单抽消耗160原晶，十连消耗1600原晶。抽卡券可通过活动、成就和商店兑换获得，每张抽卡券等同于一次单抽。星尘是抽卡副产物，积累后可在商店兑换指定角色或武器。公测约418次免费抽卡机会主要通过原晶、抽卡券和各类自选券发放。
answerEn: NTE gacha primarily uses two currencies: Original Crystals (free/paid) and Gacha Tickets. Original Crystals are the premium currency, available as free crystals (earned through gameplay, tasks, and exploration) and paid crystals (from purchases). Both types are equivalent for gacha pulls (160 per single, 1600 per 10-pull), though some exclusive items may require paid crystals. Gacha tickets from events and achievements each equal one single pull. Stardust, a gacha byproduct, can be accumulated to exchange for specific characters or weapons. At launch, the ~418 free pulls are distributed through crystals, gacha tickets, and various selector tickets.

question: 异环倾陷值是什么？怎么触发破防？
questionEn: What is Collapse (Qingxian) in NTE? How to trigger Break?
answer: 倾陷值是异环战斗中的核心机制之一，类似于其他游戏中的「破防条」或「韧性条」。每个敌人都有隐藏的倾陷值槽，通过攻击可以不断积累。触发方式：1) 普通攻击和技能攻击会积累倾陷值；2) 极限闪避成功后获得的增伤效果可以更快积累倾陷值；3) 属性克制的攻击积累更多倾陷值。当倾陷值蓄满后，敌人进入「破防」状态，期间受到的伤害大幅增加且无法行动。合理利用倾陷机制，配合队伍属性克制，是高效战斗的关键。
answerEn: Collapse (Qingxian) is a core combat mechanic in NTE, similar to a "break gauge" or "stagger meter" in other games. Every enemy has a hidden Collapse gauge that fills as you attack. How to build: 1) Normal attacks and skills fill the gauge; 2) Perfect Dodge boosts accelerate gauge filling; 3) Attribute-counter attacks fill the gauge faster. When fully charged, enemies enter a "Break" state — taking significantly increased damage and unable to act. Exploiting the Collapse mechanic combined with attribute counters is key to efficient combat.

question: 异环环合是什么？怎么触发环合爆发？
questionEn: What is Ring Fusion (Huanhe) in NTE? How to trigger it?
answer: 环合是异环的核心战斗系统之一。使用方法：1) 通过普通攻击和技能攻击积累环合值；2) 当环合值充满后，切换到对应属性的队友即可触发环合爆发；3) 环合爆发会对敌人造成大量范围伤害。推荐的属性搭配：光属性加灵属性（创生组合）可以触发自动范围爆炸，非常适合清理群怪。合理规划队伍的属性搭配和角色切换顺序，是掌握环合系统的关键。不同属性组合的环合效果各不相同，建议多尝试找到最适合你的搭配。
answerEn: Ring Fusion (Huanhe) is a core combat system in NTE. How to use: 1) Build up the Fusion gauge through normal attacks and skills; 2) When full, switch to a teammate with the matching attribute to trigger a Ring Fusion Burst; 3) The burst deals massive AoE damage. Recommended combo: Light + Spirit attribute combination triggers automatic AoE explosions, ideal for clearing groups. Planning your team's attribute composition and switch order is key to mastering Ring Fusion. Different attribute combinations produce different effects — experiment to find your best setup.

question: 异环有几个属性？属性克制关系是什么？
questionEn: How many elements does NTE have? What is the weakness chart?
answer: 异环中共有六种属性，分为光（生命/Anima）、灵（灵魂/Psyche）、咒（咒术/Incantation）、暗（混沌/Chaos）、魂（宇宙/Cosmos）和相（Lakshana）。不同属性之间存在克制关系，利用属性克制可以对敌人造成约1.5倍的额外伤害。在战斗中观察敌人的属性弱点，切换对应属性的角色进行攻击，可以大幅提高战斗效率。组建队伍时建议至少覆盖2种以上属性，避免被敌人克制。光加灵的属性组合还可以触发创生效果，在环合系统中非常强力。
answerEn: NTE features six attributes: Light (Anima), Spirit (Psyche), Incantation, Dark (Chaos), Soul (Cosmos), and Lakshana. Different attributes have weakness relationships — exploiting them deals approximately 1.5x bonus damage. Observe enemy weaknesses in combat and switch to matching attribute characters for maximum efficiency. Build teams covering at least 2 attributes to avoid being countered. The Light + Spirit combination triggers a Creation effect that's particularly powerful in the Ring Fusion system.

question: 异环A级角色哪个最强？值得培养的A级角色
questionEn: Which A-rank characters are best in NTE? A-rank worth building
answer: 异环中A级角色虽然基础面板低于S级，但培养成本更低，在特定配队中表现出色。推荐培养的A级角色：1) 智 — 培养成本极低但实用性高，适合新手过渡；2) 埃德加 — 三测中唯一的奶妈角色，在需要治疗的关卡中不可替代；3) 奈莉 — 特定配队中输出能力不俗；4) 凛子 — Incantation属性进攻型角色，伤害可观。A级角色在合理培养和装备搭配下完全可以胜任大部分游戏内容，建议零氪玩家优先培养A级角色来组建基础队伍。
answerEn: While A-rank characters have lower base stats than S-ranks, they cost less to build and perform well in specific teams. Recommended A-ranks: 1) Chiz — extremely low build cost with high practicality, great for beginners; 2) Edgar — the only healer in CBT3, irreplaceable in stages requiring healing; 3) Nelly — competitive damage in the right team composition; 4) Lingko — solid Incantation Attack damage. A-rank characters can handle most game content with proper builds. F2P players should prioritize A-ranks for their foundation team.

question: 异环薄荷怎么样？值得培养吗？
questionEn: Is Mint (Bohuo) worth building in NTE?
answer: 薄荷（Mint）是Anima属性的输出型角色。在测试期间表现不错，拥有稳定的伤害输出能力。与同为Anima属性的娜娜莉相比，薄荷的输出略低但获取难度更低。如果你没有获得娜娜莉，薄荷可以作为Anima属性输出的替代选择。在合理培养下，薄荷完全可以应对日常推图和中等难度的副本内容。如果你是零氪玩家或刚入坑的新手，薄荷是一个性价比不错的培养选择。
answerEn: Mint is an Anima attribute DPS character. During testing, Mint showed solid performance with stable damage output. Compared to the fellow Anima character Nanally, Mint deals slightly less damage but is easier to obtain. If you don't have Nanally, Mint serves as a solid Anima DPS alternative. With proper investment, Mint can handle daily content and mid-difficulty dungeons comfortably. For F2P players or beginners, Mint offers good value as a build target.

question: 异环有房屋系统吗？怎么买房装修？
questionEn: Does NTE have a housing system? How to buy and decorate a home?
answer: 异环拥有完整的房屋系统。玩家可以在海特洛市中购买属于自己的房产，并进行室内装修和家具摆放。公测版本对房屋系统进行了全面扩展，改进了家具放置的交互体验。房屋不仅是装饰性质，还可能提供一些实用的功能加成。公测路线图中确认将持续优化房屋系统，增加更多家具种类和互动玩法。邀请好友参观你的住所也是游戏社交的一部分。
answerEn: NTE features a complete housing system. Players can purchase property in Hethereau City, decorate interiors, and place furniture. The launch version significantly expands the housing system with improved furniture placement interactions. Housing isn't purely decorative — it may provide practical functional bonuses. The official roadmap confirms continued housing system improvements with more furniture types and interactive features. Inviting friends to visit your home is also part of the game's social features.

question: 异环店长特供是什么？怎么自动刷钱？
questionEn: What is the Shop Manager system in NTE? How to auto-farm currency?
answer: 店长特供是异环中一个独特的经营系统。玩家可以管理自己的店铺，设置商品后系统会自动运营产生收益。这个系统允许玩家在离线或忙于其他玩法时也能持续获得游戏内货币。设置方法：1) 在指定区域开设店铺；2) 配置要出售的商品种类；3) 系统会自动模拟经营过程并定期结算收益。这个系统为零氪玩家提供了稳定的被动收入来源，建议尽早解锁并合理配置商品以最大化收益。
answerEn: The Shop Manager is a unique business management system in NTE. Players can manage their own shops — set up products and the system automatically runs the business to generate income. This provides passive currency even when you're offline or focused on other activities. Setup: 1) Open a shop in designated areas; 2) Configure product types; 3) The system simulates operations and periodically settles profits. This system offers F2P players a stable passive income source. Unlock it early and optimize product selection for maximum returns.

question: 异环都市大亨怎么玩？城市生活系统介绍
questionEn: How does the City Tycoon mode work in NTE?
answer: 都市大亨是异环三测中新增的热门玩法系统，整合了多种城市生活模拟元素。玩家可以体验：1) 买房置业 — 在海特洛市购买不同地段的房产；2) 车辆驾驶 — 获取和驾驶多种车型在城市中穿行；3) 社交约会 — 与角色建立更深层的互动关系；4) 迷你游戏 — 包括麻将、赛车等多种休闲娱乐玩法（公测版新增AI对手）。这个系统让异环不仅有战斗和探索，还提供了丰富的休闲玩法，是游戏的一大特色。
answerEn: City Tycoon is a popular system introduced in NTE's CBT3, integrating multiple city life simulation elements. Players can: 1) Purchase real estate in different Hethereau City locations; 2) Drive various vehicles through the city; 3) Build deeper relationships with characters through social interactions; 4) Enjoy mini-games including mahjong, racing, and more (launch version adds AI opponents). This system gives NTE rich casual gameplay beyond combat and exploration, making it one of the game's standout features.

question: 异环能捏脸吗？角色自定义程度高吗？
questionEn: Does NTE have character customization? How detailed is it?
answer: 异环的角色自定义系统提供了一定程度的个性化选项，但不是传统的完全自由捏脸系统。玩家可以调整主角的外观元素，包括发型、发色等基础外观设定。与完全自定义捏脸的游戏相比，异环更注重预设角色形象的塑造，因为游戏中的角色都有完整的剧情设定和人物性格。主角虽然有一定的自定义空间，但整体上更偏向于固定形象的角色扮演体验。公测版本可能会增加更多外观选项。
answerEn: NTE offers some character customization but isn't a traditional full character creator. Players can adjust the protagonist's appearance elements including hairstyle, hair color, and other basic visual settings. Compared to games with full freeform character creation, NTE focuses more on established character designs since characters have complete story backgrounds and personalities. The protagonist has some customization options but leans toward a fixed-identity RPG experience. The launch version may add more appearance options.

question: 异环有自动战斗吗？能挂机刷材料吗？
questionEn: Does NTE have auto-battle? Can I AFK farm materials?
answer: 异环目前没有传统意义上的自动战斗系统。游戏强调手动操作的战斗乐趣，包括极限闪避、角色切换和环合爆发等机制都需要玩家主动操作。不过，游戏提供了一些减少重复操作的功能：1) 材料副本在达到一定战力后可以快速通关；2) 店长特供系统提供被动收入，不需要手动操作；3) 部分日常委托可以快速完成。目前不建议期待完整的自动战斗功能，游戏的核心乐趣在于手动战斗的策略和操作。
answerEn: NTE currently doesn't have a traditional auto-battle system. The game emphasizes manual combat enjoyment — Perfect Dodge, character switching, and Ring Fusion all require active player input. However, some features reduce repetitive grinding: 1) Material domains can be quick-cleared once you exceed the power threshold; 2) The Shop Manager system provides passive income without manual play; 3) Some daily commissions can be quick-completed. Don't expect full auto-battle — NTE's core appeal is strategic and manual combat.

question: 异环怎么开车？有哪些载具？
questionEn: How to drive vehicles in NTE? What vehicles are available?
answer: 异环拥有完整的载具驾驶系统，玩家可以在海特洛市的开放世界中自由驾驶多种车辆。载具种类包括多种轿车和跑车等不同车型，公测版本还增加了更多车辆种类。驾驶操作支持触屏虚拟方向盘和手柄操控，PC端支持键盘控制。公测版对全平台的驾驶机制进行了优化，操控手感更加流畅。车辆不仅是交通工具，还可以在特定任务和活动中使用。部分稀有载具需要通过游戏内活动或成就获取。
answerEn: NTE features a complete vehicle driving system. Players can freely drive various vehicles through Hethereau City's open world. Vehicle types include multiple sedans and sports cars, with more varieties added in the launch version. Controls support touch-screen virtual steering, gamepad, and keyboard. The launch version optimizes driving mechanics across all platforms for smoother handling. Vehicles serve as transportation and are used in specific missions and events. Some rare vehicles are earned through in-game events and achievements.

question: 异环支持鸿蒙系统吗？华为手机能玩吗？
questionEn: Is NTE available on HarmonyOS? Can I play on Huawei phones?
answer: 异环确认支持鸿蒙（HarmonyOS）系统。华为手机用户可以直接在鸿蒙系统的应用市场中搜索并下载异环。游戏对鸿蒙系统进行了专门适配，确保在华为设备上能正常运行。需要注意的是，由于游戏使用虚幻引擎5开发，对硬件配置有一定要求，建议使用较新的华为旗舰机型以获得最佳体验。如果设备配置较低，可以在游戏设置中降低画质来提升流畅度。
answerEn: NTE is confirmed to support HarmonyOS. Huawei phone users can search for and download NTE directly from the HarmonyOS app market. The game has been specifically optimized for HarmonyOS to ensure proper functionality on Huawei devices. Note that since NTE uses Unreal Engine 5, it has hardware requirements — newer Huawei flagship models are recommended for the best experience. If your device has lower specs, you can reduce graphics settings in-game for better performance.

question: 异环预抽卡活动怎么参加？有什么奖励？
questionEn: How to participate in the NTE pre-gacha event? What are the rewards?
seoTitleZh: 异环预约奖励怎么领？预抽卡活动完整领取攻略与截止时间
seoTitleEn: NTE Pre-Gacha Event Guide: How to Claim Rewards Before Launch
seoDescriptionZh: 异环预抽卡活动参与攻略：预约奖励领取方式、活动截止时间、Fabrication Dice×20等奖励一览，错过截止日期将无法参与。
seoDescriptionEn: Complete guide to NTE pre-gacha event: how to participate, claim Fabrication Dice x20 and other rewards, event deadline, and tips for maximizing your pulls.
answer: 异环公测前正在举办预抽卡活动，参加方式：1) 前往官网或TapTap的异环预抽卡活动页面；2) 定制你的「海特洛市民卡」；3) 完成指定任务获取启程道具抽取机会。活动奖励包括：Fabrication Dice×20、A级Arc Disc、抽卡券等珍贵资源。活动截止时间为2026年4月22日23:59，请务必在此之前完成参与。此外，参与过此前「共存测试」的玩家在公测时可以获得充值返还。实体奖品还包括PS5主机和官方周边。
answerEn: NTE is running a pre-gacha event before launch. How to participate: 1) Visit the official website or TapTap pre-gacha event page; 2) Customize your Hethereau Citizen Card; 3) Complete tasks to earn draw chances. Rewards include: Fabrication Dice ×20, A-rank Arc Disc, gacha tickets, and more. The event ends on April 22, 2026 at 23:59 — participate before then. Players who participated in the Coexistence Test will receive purchase refunds at launch. Physical prizes include a PS5 console and official merchandise.

question: 异环前瞻直播兑换码有哪些？怎么领取？
questionEn: What are the NTE livestream redeem codes? How to claim?
answer: 异环公测前瞻直播（4月18日）公布了6个兑换码。国服兑换码：YHNOWTOENJOY、YHNANALLYGO、YHOB0423，有效期至2026年5月7日23:59。国际服兑换码：NTENOWTOENJOY、NTENANALLYGO、NTE0429，有效期至2026年5月13日23:59。兑换方式：进入游戏后，点击右上角头像 → 设置 → 兑换码输入框中输入即可。注意兑换码需在游戏上线后才能使用，建议在开服后第一时间兑换，避免过期。
answerEn: The NTE launch preview livestream (April 18) revealed 6 redeem codes. CN server: YHNOWTOENJOY, YHNANALLYGO, YHOB0423 (expire May 7, 2026). Global server: NTENOWTOENJOY, NTENANALLYGO, NTE0429 (expire May 13, 2026). How to redeem: Enter the game → tap your profile icon (top-right) → Settings → enter code in the Redeem Code field. Codes can only be used after the game launches. Redeem immediately after launch to avoid expiration.

question: 异环抽卡真的没有50/50吗？公测前瞻直播确认了什么？
questionEn: Does NTE really have no 50/50? What did the livestream confirm?
answer: 公测前瞻直播已正式确认：异环的限定角色卡池没有50/50机制。这意味着触发保底时100%获得当期UP的限定S级角色，不存在「歪」到常驻角色的情况。具体规则：限定池90抽硬保底，平均出货约53.5抽；新手池20抽必出S级且可自选；常驻池50抽可自选S级；武器池80抽保底UP武器。与原神的180抽最差情况相比，异环只需90抽就能确保获得想要的限定角色，资源效率翻倍。
answerEn: The launch livestream officially confirmed: NTE limited character banner has NO 50/50 system. When pity triggers, you are 100% guaranteed the featured limited S-rank character — no losing to standard pool characters. Specific rules: Limited banner 90-pull hard pity, average ~53.5 pulls; Beginner banner 20-pull guaranteed S-rank with selector; Standard banner 50-pull S-rank selector; Weapon banner 80-pull featured weapon pity. Compared to Genshin worst case of 180 pulls, NTE only needs 90 pulls to guarantee your desired limited character — double the resource efficiency.

question: 异环新手池20抽自选是什么意思？能选什么角色？
questionEn: What is the NTE beginner 20-pull selector? Which characters can I choose?
answer: 异环新手祈愿池的核心机制是：20抽内必出S级角色，而且可以自选你想要的那个角色。目前确认的可选角色包括薄荷（Mint）和早雾两位S级角色。薄荷是一名强力输出型角色，技能组合适合新手上手，前期推图效率高；早雾偏向辅助定位，能为队伍提供稳定增益。新手池仅限一次使用，建议优先选择薄荷来加速前期推图，除非你计划从限定池抽到其他输出角色。
answerEn: NTE Beginner Wish core mechanic: guaranteed S-rank within 20 pulls, with a character selector. Currently confirmed selectable characters include Mint and Hayate, both S-rank. Mint is a powerful DPS with beginner-friendly skills and high early-game efficiency. Hayate leans toward support, providing stable team buffs. The beginner banner is one-time only. Recommended: Choose Mint to accelerate early progression unless you plan to pull a DPS from the limited banner.

question: 异环常驻池50抽自选S级怎么触发？能选谁？
questionEn: How does the NTE standard 50-pull S-rank selector work?
answer: 异环常驻祈愿池提供50抽自选S级角色的机制。当你累计在常驻池抽满50抽后，可以从常驻S级角色名单中任选一位获得。常驻池的90抽硬保底也依然存在，但50抽自选让你不需要等到硬保底就能定向获取想要的角色。常驻S级角色包括娜娜莉、咲里、法蒂亚、拉克莉莫萨、白藏、零、穗鸟、达芙迪尔、薄荷等。建议优先选择你队伍缺少的定位角色，如没有好的支援就选咲里，没有坦克就选白藏。
answerEn: NTE Standard Wish offers a 50-pull S-rank selector. After accumulating 50 pulls on the standard banner, you can choose any one character from the standard S-rank roster. The 90-pull hard pity still exists, but the 50-pull selector lets you target specific characters without waiting for pity. Standard S-rank characters include Nanally, Sakiri, Fadia, Lacrimosa, Baicang, Zero, Hotori, Daffodil, Mint, and more. Recommendation: Prioritize the role your team needs most — Sakiri for support, Baicang for tanking.

question: 异环测试服充值怎么返还？返还比例是多少？
questionEn: How does NTE beta refund work? What is the refund rate?
answer: 异环官方确认，参与过测试服（共存测试）并有充值的玩家将获得充值返还，最高返还比例达150%。返还将在公测后通过游戏内邮件发放，形式为等值的游戏内货币。具体返还比例：首次充值部分150%返还，累计充值1000元以下部分120%返还，1000-5000元部分110%返还，5000元以上部分100%返还。此外，测试服购买的月卡和通行证也将在公测后免费赠送。这一返还比例在行业内属于最高水平。
answerEn: NTE officially confirmed beta tester recharge refunds at up to 150%. Refunds will be delivered via in-game mail after launch as equivalent in-game currency. Refund rates: first purchase at 150%, cumulative spending under 1,000 CNY at 120%, 1,000-5,000 CNY at 110%, above 5,000 CNY at 100%. Monthly passes and battle passes purchased during beta will also be given free at launch. This refund rate is among the highest in the industry.

question: 异环小志怎么免费获得？都市大亨玩法详解
questionEn: How to get Xiaozhi for free in NTE? City Tycoon guide
answer: 小志（Xiaozhi）是异环公测新增的S级角色，可以通过「都市大亨」系统免费获得，且可以满突破。都市大亨是异环中整合了城市生活模拟元素的热门玩法，包括买房置业、车辆驾驶、社交互动、迷你游戏（麻将、赛车等，公测新增AI对手）等内容。通过持续参与都市大亨玩法，玩家可以积累资源解锁小志。这是游戏中非常少见的免费S级角色获取途径，建议所有玩家优先参与。
answerEn: Xiaozhi is a new S-rank character added for launch, available for free through the City Tycoon system with full breakthrough potential. City Tycoon is a popular gameplay mode integrating city life simulation elements including real estate, vehicle driving, social interactions, and mini-games (mahjong, racing with new AI opponents). By consistently participating in City Tycoon activities, players can accumulate resources to unlock Xiaozhi. This is a rare free S-rank acquisition path — all players should prioritize participating.

question: 异环预下载4月21日几点开始？PC和手机怎么预下载？
questionEn: When exactly does NTE pre-download start on April 21? How to pre-download?
answer: 异环公测预下载确认于2026年4月21日开放。PC端可通过官网（yh.wanmei.com）或Epic Games Store下载客户端启动器；移动端可在App Store和Google Play预约后自动下载。PC端游戏文件约25-30GB，移动端约8-10GB。建议使用WiFi提前下载避免开服当天服务器拥堵。预下载完成后，4月23日开服即可直接进入游戏无需额外等待。关注官方社交媒体获取预下载开启的确切时间点。
answerEn: NTE pre-download is confirmed to open on April 21, 2026. PC players can download through the official website (yh.wanmei.com) or Epic Games Store. Mobile users can pre-order on App Store and Google Play for automatic download. PC file size: approximately 25-30GB. Mobile: approximately 8-10GB. Download early via WiFi to avoid launch-day server congestion. Once pre-downloaded, you can enter the game immediately when servers open on April 23. Follow official social media for the exact pre-download start time.

question: 异环推荐用什么NVIDIA驱动？RT光追怎么开？
questionEn: Which NVIDIA driver is recommended for NTE? How to enable RT?
answer: NVIDIA已为异环公测发布了专属优化的显卡驱动596.21版本WHQL。该驱动针对异环的虚幻引擎5渲染管线进行了专门优化，可提升约15-20%的帧率表现并降低显存占用。建议所有NVIDIA显卡用户在公测前更新。RT光追开启方式：游戏设置 → 画面设置 → 光线追踪选项（需RTX系列显卡）。光追效果主要体现在都市夜景的建筑反射、霓虹灯散射和水面倒影上，视觉效果提升显著但会降低帧率，建议RTX 3060以上显卡开启。
answerEn: NVIDIA released driver 596.21 WHQL specifically optimized for NTE. It targets the Unreal Engine 5 rendering pipeline, improving frame rates by approximately 15-20% while reducing VRAM usage. All NVIDIA GPU users should update before launch. To enable RT ray tracing: Game Settings → Graphics → Ray Tracing option (requires RTX series GPU). RT effects primarily enhance urban night scene building reflections, neon light scattering, and water reflections. Visual improvement is significant but reduces frame rate — recommended for RTX 3060 or above.

question: 异环公测上线有哪些角色？16位角色完整名单
questionEn: What characters are available at NTE launch? Complete 16-character roster
answer: 异环公测1.0版本确认上线16位可操控角色。S级11位：娜娜莉（Anima/进攻）、咲里（Incantation/支援）、达芙迪尔（Chaos/支援）、拉克莉莫萨（Chaos/进攻）、零（Cosmos/进攻）、白藏（Incantation/防护）、法蒂亚（Psyche/进攻）、哈索尔（Lakshana/进攻）、穗鸟（Cosmos/进攻）、赤子（Cosmos/进攻）、九原（Anima/辅助）。A级5位：薄荷（Anima/进攻）、埃德加（Cosmos/生存）、哈尼尔（Psyche，免费赠送）、翳（Lakshana/进攻）、爱德勒（Incantation/生存）。另有新增A级角色奥蕾莉亚和通过都市大亨免费获得的S级角色小志。首发限定UP角色为娜娜莉。
answerEn: NTE Version 1.0 confirmed 16 playable characters at launch. S-rank (11): Nanally (Anima/Attack), Sakiri (Incantation/Support), Daffodil (Chaos/Support), Lacrimosa (Chaos/Attack), Zero (Cosmos/Attack), Baicang (Incantation/Defense), Fadia (Psyche/Attack), Hathor (Lakshana/Attack), Hotori (Cosmos/Attack), Chiz (Cosmos/Attack), Jiuyuan (Anima/Utility). A-rank (5): Mint (Anima/Attack), Edgar (Cosmos/Survival), Haniel (Psyche, free gift), Skia (Lakshana/Attack), Adler (Incantation/Survival). Plus new A-rank Aurelia and free S-rank Xiaozhi via City Tycoon. First limited banner features Nanally.

question: 异环粉爪联机是什么？怎么和朋友一起玩？
questionEn: What is Pink Paws co-op in NTE? How to play with friends?
answer: 粉爪是异环公测新增的社交联机系统。玩家可以创建或加入探索小队，最多4人同时在线探索海特洛市的开放世界。粉爪系统支持实时语音通话、位置共享和协作任务触发。联机时宝箱和收集品是独立的（每个人都能拾取），不会出现争抢的情况。世界Boss可以多人协作挑战，降低战斗难度。公测版还新增了Pink Paws Heist联机关卡，提供更丰富的多人玩法。
answerEn: Pink Paws is a new social co-op system in NTE. Players can create or join exploration squads of up to 4 players for simultaneous open-world exploration in Hethereau City. The system supports real-time voice chat, location sharing, and cooperative quest triggering. Chests and collectibles are independent per player — no competition. World Bosses can be tackled cooperatively for easier fights. The launch version also adds Pink Paws Heist co-op levels for richer multiplayer gameplay.

question: 异环监狱系统是什么？怎么玩？
questionEn: What is the Anomaly Prison system in NTE? How does it work?
answer: 异常监狱是异环公测新增的独特探索区域。玩家需要潜入监狱调查异常事件，面对特殊的敌人类型和解谜关卡。监狱区域的氛围营造融合了恐怖和悬疑元素，与主城的都市幻想风格形成鲜明对比。公测版对监狱玩法进行了扩展，增加了更多逃脱方法、任务和奖励。建议携带战斗能力较强的队伍前往，因为监狱内的敌人强度较高。
answerEn: Anomaly Prison is a unique new exploration zone in NTE. Players must infiltrate the prison to investigate anomalous events, facing special enemy types and puzzle encounters. The atmosphere blends horror and mystery elements, contrasting with the main city urban fantasy style. The launch version expands prison gameplay with more escape methods, quests, and rewards. Bring a strong combat team — enemies inside are challenging.

question: 异环奥蕾莉亚是谁？公测新A级角色介绍
questionEn: Who is Aurelia in NTE? New A-rank launch character
answer: 奥蕾莉亚（Aurelia）是异环公测新增的A级角色。她在前瞻直播中首次亮相，此前未在任何测试版本中出现过。具体属性、武器类型和技能详情将在公测后确认。作为新增角色，奥蕾莉亚可能拥有独特的技能机制来丰富队伍搭配的多样性。建议关注游戏内的角色预览和我们网站的角色详情页面获取最新信息。
answerEn: Aurelia is a new A-rank character added for NTE launch. She debuted during the livestream preview and did not appear in any previous beta test. Specific attribute, weapon type, and skill details will be confirmed after launch. As a new character, Aurelia likely features unique skill mechanics to expand team composition variety. Check in-game character previews and our character detail pages for the latest information.

question: 异环手机版支持手柄吗？
questionEn: Does NTE mobile support controllers?
answer: 异环手机版（Android/iOS）支持蓝牙手柄连接。北通、雷蛇等品牌手柄已确认兼容。连接方式：设置→蓝牙→配对手柄→进入游戏自动识别。PS5 DualSense手柄也可在PC和PS5版使用，但移动端目前不支持DualSense。
answerEn: NTE mobile (Android/iOS) supports Bluetooth controllers. Beon, Razer, and other brands are confirmed compatible. Connect via Settings → Bluetooth → Pair controller → Auto-detected in-game. PS5 DualSense works on PC and PS5 but not mobile.

question: 异环手机版画质怎么调？发烫发热怎么办？
questionEn: How to optimize NTE mobile graphics? Overheating fix
answer: 异环手机版优化建议：1) 在设置→画面中降低「渲染精度」至中或低；2) 关闭「动态模糊」和「体积光」；3) 帧率设为30帧可大幅减少发热；4) 关闭后台应用释放内存；5) 避免边充电边游玩。如设备发热严重，建议使用散热背夹或切换到PC端。iPhone 12 Pro Max为iOS最低设备，推荐iPhone 14及以上获得流畅体验。
answerEn: Mobile optimization tips: 1) Lower Render Resolution to Medium or Low in Settings → Graphics; 2) Disable Motion Blur and Volumetric Lighting; 3) Set framerate to 30 FPS to reduce heat; 4) Close background apps; 5) Avoid charging while playing. If overheating persists, use a cooling clip or switch to PC. iPhone 12 Pro Max is the iOS minimum; iPhone 14+ recommended for smooth gameplay.

question: 异环安卓最低配置是什么？哪些手机能玩？
questionEn: What are NTE Android minimum specs? Which phones are supported?
answer: 异环安卓最低配置：处理器骁龙855/麒麟990及以上，内存6GB及以上，存储空间预留约20GB。推荐配置：骁龙8 Gen1/天玑9000及以上，8GB+内存。可流畅运行的常见机型：小米12及以上、三星S22及以上、OPPO Find X5及以上、华为Mate 40及以上。低于最低配置的设备可能无法安装或运行卡顿。
answerEn: NTE Android minimum specs: Snapdragon 855 / Kirin 990+, 6GB RAM, ~20GB storage. Recommended: Snapdragon 8 Gen 1 / Dimensity 9000+, 8GB+ RAM. Smooth on: Xiaomi 12+, Samsung S22+, OPPO Find X5+, Huawei Mate 40+. Devices below minimum specs may not install or run poorly.

question: 异环iOS最低支持哪些设备？
questionEn: What iOS devices does NTE support?
answer: 异环iOS最低设备要求：iPhone 12 Pro Max及以上，iPad Air 3及以上，系统iOS 15.0+。推荐设备：iPhone 14及以上、iPad Pro M1及以上可获得高画质流畅体验。iPad mini 5和iPad第8代也可以运行但画质受限。注意：iPhone 12/12 mini/12 Pro（非Max）未列入官方支持列表。
answerEn: NTE iOS minimum: iPhone 12 Pro Max and later, iPad Air 3+, iOS 15.0+. Recommended: iPhone 14+, iPad Pro M1+ for high-quality smooth gameplay. iPad mini 5 and iPad 8th gen work but with limited graphics. Note: iPhone 12/12 mini/12 Pro (non-Max) are not on the official support list.

question: 异环手机版占用空间太大怎么办？
questionEn: NTE mobile takes too much storage, what to do?
answer: 异环手机版资源包约20GB，加上安装包总计可能超过25GB。节省空间方法：1) 在游戏设置→资源管理中卸载不需要的语音包；2) 只下载当前需要的地图区域资源（如支持分区下载）；3) 定期清理游戏缓存：设置→其他→清除缓存；4) 将游戏安装到SD卡（部分Android机型支持）；5) 使用云游戏版本免下载体验。
answerEn: NTE mobile resource pack is ~20GB, total with installer may exceed 25GB. Save space by: 1) Remove unused voice packs in Settings → Resource Management; 2) Download only needed map region resources; 3) Clear cache periodically: Settings → Other → Clear Cache; 4) Install to SD card (some Android devices); 5) Use cloud gaming version for download-free play.

question: 异环怎么跨平台同步数据？PC和手机怎么互通？
questionEn: How to sync NTE data across platforms? PC-mobile cross-save
answer: 异环全平台数据互通操作方法：1) 确保所有设备登录同一个完美世界账号；2) PC端在登录界面选择账号登录；3) 移动端在登录界面选择相同账号方式；4) PS5端在首次启动时绑定完美世界账号。绑定后角色等级、装备、任务进度、抽卡记录全部实时同步。注意：每个账号只能绑定一个PS5账号，绑定后不可更改。6平台互通包括PC、Android、iOS、Mac、鸿蒙、PS5。
answerEn: Cross-platform sync setup: 1) Log in with the same Perfect World account on all devices; 2) PC: select account login; 3) Mobile: use the same login method; 4) PS5: bind your Perfect World account on first launch. After binding, character level, equipment, quest progress, and gacha history sync in real-time. Note: Each account can only bind one PSN account, non-changeable. All 6 platforms supported: PC, Android, iOS, Mac, HarmonyOS, PS5.

question: 异环鸿蒙版怎么下载？支持哪些设备？
questionEn: How to download NTE on HarmonyOS? Supported devices?
answer: 异环鸿蒙版下载方式：打开华为应用市场→搜索「异环」→下载安装。最低配置：麒麟990处理器及以上，6GB内存，预留约20GB空间。支持设备：华为Mate 40及以上、P40及以上、MatePad Pro系列。鸿蒙版与Android版共享同一客户端数据，通过华为账号或完美世界账号登录即可同步进度。
answerEn: HarmonyOS download: Open Huawei AppGallery → Search 'NTE' → Install. Minimum specs: Kirin 990+, 6GB RAM, ~20GB storage. Supported: Huawei Mate 40+, P40+, MatePad Pro series. Shares same client data as Android; sync progress via Huawei ID or Perfect World account.

question: 异环手机玩一会儿就没电怎么办？
questionEn: NTE drains my phone battery fast, how to fix?
answer: 异环是高画质开放世界游戏，对手机性能要求较高，耗电快是正常现象。省电建议：1) 开启手机省电模式（可能限制帧率）；2) 降低游戏内画质设置（关闭体积光、动态模糊，降低渲染精度）；3) 帧率锁定30帧可省电30%以上；4) 屏幕亮度调低；5) 使用充电宝边充边玩（注意发热）；6) 长时间游玩建议切换到PC或PS5端。
answerEn: NTE is a high-end open world game that demands significant phone resources. Battery saving tips: 1) Enable phone power-saving mode (may limit framerate); 2) Lower in-game graphics (disable volumetric lighting, motion blur, reduce render resolution); 3) Lock to 30 FPS to save 30%+ battery; 4) Reduce screen brightness; 5) Use a power bank (watch for overheating); 6) For long sessions, switch to PC or PS5.

question: 异环自选S角色选谁？新手自选S推荐
questionEn: Which S-rank character should I pick from the selector in NTE?
answer: 新手自选S角色推荐顺序：1) 薄荷（Mint）— 开服最强免费奶妈，几乎必选，创生队/浊燃队都适用；2) 早雾（Hotori）— 聚怪+增伤辅助，如果你打算抽娜娜莉，早雾是最佳搭档；3) 九原（Jiuyuan）— 常驻池可歪，不建议用自选券选。常驻五星整体优先级：薄荷 > 早雾 > 白藏 > 达芙迪尔。结论：90%的新手应该选薄荷，她是最通用的S级角色。
answerEn: Starter S-rank selector recommendation: 1) Mint — Best free healer, fits almost every team; 2) Hotori — Grouping + ATK buffer, best paired with Nanally; 3) Jiuyuan — Available from standard banner, don't waste selector. Overall priority: Mint > Hotori > Baicang > Daffodil. Conclusion: 90% of new players should pick Mint.

question: 异环公测免费可以抽多少次？470抽怎么拿到？
questionEn: How many free pulls can you get in NTE launch? How to get 470 pulls?
answer: 公测版本全平台可获取约418-470抽（含预注册奖励、公测活动、主线奖励、成就奖励等）。注意：470抽需要完成大量游戏进度才能全部拿到，实际首日可获取约150-200抽。获取途径：1) 预注册奖励：约80抽；2) 公测登录活动：14天签到约42抽；3) 主线任务推进：约100抽；4) 探索度/成就：约50抽；5) 异象收容/挑战：约30抽；6) 新手福利/教程：约50抽。零氪玩家建议优先推进主线拿抽卡资源。
answerEn: Total free pulls in launch version: ~418-470 (including pre-registration, events, story, achievements). Note: 470 pulls require significant game progress. Realistic Day 1 pulls: ~150-200. Sources: Pre-registration (~80), 14-day login (~42), Story quests (~100), Exploration/Achievements (~50), Anomaly challenges (~30), Tutorial bonuses (~50). F2P players should prioritize story progression for gacha currency.

question: 异环体力怎么分配？零氪开荒体力规划
questionEn: How to spend stamina in NTE? F2P stamina planning guide
answer: 前期体力分配建议：1-30级：全部投入主线和角色升级材料副本；30-45级：70%角色升级材料 + 30%武器强化材料；45级后：优先弧盘副本 > 技能升级材料 > 武器材料。关键原则：1) 不要平均分配，集中培养2个主力角色；2) 每天先用完体力再下线；3) 优先刷当前卡关需要的材料；4) 弧盘副本收益最高，解锁后优先投入。零氪玩家不要浪费体力在低级副本，直接打能打的最高难度。
answerEn: Early stamina planning: Lv1-30: All on story + character leveling materials; Lv30-45: 70% character materials + 30% weapon materials; Lv45+: Arc Disc dungeons > Skill materials > Weapon materials. Key tips: 1) Focus on 2 main characters; 2) Use all daily stamina; 3) Prioritize bottleneck materials; 4) Arc Disc dungeons have highest ROI.

question: 异环环合反应怎么触发？属性反应机制详解
questionEn: How do Ring Fusion reactions work in NTE? Elemental reaction guide
answer:
环合反应是异环的核心战斗系统，通过两种不同属性的角色配合触发。游戏共有6种属性：光、灵、相、暗、魂、咒，可触发8种环合反应：

**永动循环线（光属性核心）**：
- 创生（光+灵）：召唤持续存在的召唤花，触发盈蓄效果持续回复大招能量
- 延滞（光+相）：强力控怪效果，减速/限制敌人行动

**破盾爆发线（暗属性核心）**：
- 浊燃（暗+咒）：给敌人挂上点燃状态
- 黯星（暗+魂）：触发一次性高额爆发伤害
- 失谐（点燃+爆发）：核心破盾反应

**伤害提升线**：
- 覆纹（灵+咒）：给敌人挂上易伤debuff
- 浸染（相+魂）：持续类增伤效果

此外还有2种三属性反应需要三种不同属性角色同时在场。建议新手优先掌握创生和浊燃两条核心反应线。
answerEn:
Ring Fusion is NTE's core combat system, triggered by combining two different attributes. 6 attributes (Light, Spirit, Phase, Dark, Soul, Curse) create 8 reactions:

**Sustain Line (Light core)**: Genesis (Light+Spirit) summons flowers for energy regen; Delay (Light+Phase) slows/CC enemies.

**Shield-break Line (Dark core)**: Turbid Burn (Dark+Curse) applies Ignite; Dark Star (Dark+Soul) burst damage; Disharmony (Ignite+Burst) breaks shields.

**Damage Boost Line**: Overlay (Spirit+Curse) adds vulnerability; Infiltration (Phase+Soul) sustained damage boost.

Plus 2 triple-attribute reactions. Beginners should prioritize Genesis and Turbid Burn lines.

question: 异环弧盘系统怎么玩？弧盘获取和强化攻略
questionEn: How does the Arc Disc system work in NTE? Disc acquisition and upgrade guide
answer: 弧盘是异环公测版本最重要的装备系统，战力提升幅度最大。弧盘分C/B/A/S四个品质，每个角色装备一个。获取途径：1) 击败Boss异象掉落（海囚S级概率最高）；2) 弧盘副本（高塔）挑战；3) 空幕装置商店兑换；4) 异象收容任务奖励；5) 公测活动赠送A级弧盘。强化建议：优先强化S级弧盘到满级，A级作为过渡，C/B级仅做材料。输出角色选暴击率/暴击伤害/攻击力%副属性，辅助角色选能量回复/效果命中/生命值%副属性。
answerEn: Arc Discs are NTE's most important equipment system. Ranked C/B/A/S, each character equips one. Sources: 1) Boss anomaly drops (Sea Prisoner best for S-rank); 2) Tower dungeon; 3) Shop exchange; 4) Anomaly containment rewards; 5) Event rewards. Upgrade S-rank discs first, A-rank as transition. DPS: Crit/CritDMG/ATK% subs; Support: EnergyRegen/EffectHit/HP% subs.

question: 异环零氪新手怎么开荒？第一天必做清单
questionEn: NTE F2P beginner guide: Day 1 must-do checklist
answer: 零氪新手第一天开荒路线：1) 完成全部教程关卡（约30分钟）；2) 推进主线到第三章（获取大量抽卡资源）；3) 使用新手池抽卡，利用6选1自选S级角色（推荐薄荷）；4) 集中资源培养主力队伍（1主C+1辅助+1生存）；5) 解锁所有已探索区域的传送点；6) 完成每日委托；7) 参与公测登录活动领14天签到奖励；8) 兑换3个公测兑换码；9) 不要分散培养，先确定2个核心角色集中投入。零氪玩家约可获得150-200抽，足够组建一支强力队伍。
answerEn: F2P Day 1 checklist: 1) Complete all tutorials (~30min); 2) Progress story to Chapter 3 (lots of gacha currency); 3) Use beginner banner 6-choose-1 (pick Mint); 4) Focus resources on 1 DPS + 1 Support + 1 Survival; 5) Unlock all discovered teleport points; 6) Complete daily commissions; 7) Claim 14-day login event rewards; 8) Redeem 3 launch codes; 9) Don't spread resources — focus on 2 core characters. F2P can get ~150-200 pulls for a strong team.

question: 异环公测引擎升级到UE5.7了吗？有什么变化？
questionEn: Did NTE upgrade to UE5.7 at launch? What changed?
answer: 是的，异环公测版本从测试阶段的UE5.5升级到了UE5.7。主要变化：1) 画面表现力提升，光影和反射效果更精细；2) 移动端优化改进，但高画质下发热仍然明显；3) 加载速度改善，尤其NVMe SSD用户感受明显；4) 面部表情系统全面改进（公测前后对比差异大）；5) 新增第一人称模式（全球服确认）。UE5.7引擎对硬件要求与之前基本持平，不需要额外升级配置。
answerEn: Yes, NTE launched on UE5.7 (upgraded from UE5.5 beta). Key changes: 1) Improved visuals with better lighting and reflections; 2) Mobile optimization improved but high settings still cause heating; 3) Faster loading especially on NVMe SSD; 4) Facial expression system overhaul; 5) First-person mode added (confirmed for global). Hardware requirements remain similar to before.

question: 异环角色培养优先级是什么？先升谁？
questionEn: What is the character leveling priority in NTE? Who to build first?
answer: 角色培养优先级建议：第一优先级（必练）：主力输出角色等级+武器 → 等级拉满到当前上限。第二优先级（尽快升）：辅助角色的关键技能等级（影响增益数值）。第三优先级（中期补齐）：生存位角色的防御和生命属性。具体角色优先级：1) 娜娜莉/达芙迪尔（主C，全力投入）；2) 九原/薄荷（辅助核心，技能等级重要）；3) 白藏/阿德勒（生存位，40级够用）；4) 其他A/B级角色按需培养。切记不要平均分配资源，集中投入2-3个核心角色。
answerEn: Character build priority: 1st priority (must-build): Main DPS level + weapon to max. 2nd: Support key skill levels. 3rd: Survival role DEF/HP. Specific priority: 1) Nanally/Daffodil (main DPS, full investment); 2) Jiuyuan/Mint (core supports, skill levels matter); 3) Baicang/Adler (survival, Lv40 sufficient); 4) Other A/B-ranks as needed. Never spread resources evenly — focus on 2-3 core characters.

question: 异环创生队怎么配？最强配队推荐
questionEn: How to build Genesis team in NTE?
answer: 创生队是公测最强队伍之一，核心反应为创生（光+灵）。推荐配队：娜娜莉（主C）+ 早雾（聚怪增伤）+ 九原（副C/聚怪）+ 主角（触发环合）。替代方案：薄荷替换九原提供治疗。操作要点：早雾先手聚怪增伤 → 娜娜莉输出触发创生 → 主角即瞬环合 → 循环。
answerEn: Genesis team: Nanally (DPS) + Hotori (grouping/ATK buff) + Jiuyuan (sub-DPS) + Protagonist (Ring Fusion). Alternative: Mint replaces Jiuyuan for healing.

question: 异环浊燃队怎么配？暗属性破盾队推荐
questionEn: How to build Turbid Burn team in NTE?
answer: 浊燃队利用浊燃（暗+咒）+失谐反应快速破盾。推荐配队：翳（暗属性挂点燃）+ 阿德勒（触发失谐破盾）+ 莉莉娜（暗属性输出）+ 白藏（护盾生存）。翳先手挂浊燃点燃 → 莉莉娜暗属性输出 → 阿德勒触发失谐破盾 → 白藏保证生存。
answerEn: Turbid Burn team: Skia (Dark Ignite) + Adler (Disharmony break) + Lilina (Dark DPS) + Baicang (shield/survival).

question: 异环平民配队推荐？零氪最强队伍
questionEn: Best F2P team comp in NTE?
answer: 零氪最强配队：薄荷（自选S治疗核心）+ 小吱（都市大亨免费6+5）+ 埃德加（A级聚怪）+ 主角（免费环合触发）。全部免费。中期目标：抽娜娜莉替换小吱组建创生队。
answerEn: Best F2P: Mint (free S healer) + Xiaozhi (free 6+5) + Edgar (A-rank grouping) + Protagonist. All free. Mid-term: pull Nanally for Genesis team.

question: 异环灼烧队怎么配？白藏火系配队
questionEn: How to build Blaze team in NTE?
answer: 灼烧队以白藏为核心坦克。推荐配队：白藏（主坦）+ 赤音（火属性主C）+ 哈尼尔（增伤）+ 薄荷（治疗）。白藏护盾基于防御力，使用坚岩之心4件套。适合高难度Boss战。
answerEn: Blaze team: Baicang (tank) + Akane (fire DPS) + Haniel (ATK buff) + Mint (healing). Baicang shield scales with DEF, use Heart of Stone 4pc.

question: 异环公测最强配队排名？T0队伍推荐
questionEn: Best launch teams ranked in NTE?
answer: 公测T0：①创生队（娜娜莉+早雾+九原+主角）；②浊燃破盾队（翳+阿德勒+莉莉娜+白藏）。T1：③灼烧队（赤音+白藏+哈尼尔+薄荷）；④速切队（黑鸟+零+咲里+支援）。零氪队：薄荷+小吱+埃德加+主角。配队核心：2同属性触发环合+1不同属性+1生存位。
answerEn: T0: Genesis (Nanally+Hotori+Jiuyuan+Protag), Turbid Burn (Skia+Adler+Lilina+Baicang). T1: Blaze, Quick-Swap. F2P: Mint+Xiaozhi+Edgar+Protag.

question: 异环磁盘怎么强化？强化材料获取
questionEn: How to upgrade disks in NTE?
answer: 磁盘强化：角色界面→磁盘栏位→强化→消耗低品质磁盘当材料。同套装材料有额外经验加成。建议：只强化A级和S级磁盘，C/B级当材料。输出磁盘优先暴击率/暴击伤害，辅助优先能量回复。
answerEn: Character screen → Disk slot → Enhance → Use lower-quality disks as fodder. Only upgrade A/S-rank. DPS: Crit; Support: Energy Regen.

question: 异环武器怎么升级？武器强化材料哪里刷？
questionEn: How to upgrade weapons in NTE?
answer: 武器材料来源：1) 胡迪尼的魔术舞台副本（固定掉落）；2) 异象挑战掉落；3) 商店兑换。建议：优先升S级角色武器到上限；A级只过渡；不浪费在B/C级。主C武器等级=角色等级，辅助可低10-20级。
answerEn: Materials: Houdini dungeon, anomaly drops, shop. Prioritize S-rank weapons. Main DPS weapon = char level, support 10-20 lower.

question: 异环磁盘套装怎么选？各定位最佳套装
questionEn: Which disk set to use per role in NTE?
answer: 主C暴击流：狂战士之怒4件套。主C反应流：裂空之牙4件套。治疗：繁星之誓4件套。增伤辅助：万象归一4件套。坦克：坚岩之心4件套。高爆发主C：炽焰之心4件套。充能辅助：回响之潮4件套。
answerEn: DPS Crit: Berserker Fury. DPS Reaction: Skyrending Fang. Healer: Stellar Vow. Buffer: Unity of All. Tank: Heart of Stone. Burst DPS: Blazing Heart. Energy Support: Resonance Tide.

question: 异环和绝区零哪个好玩？
questionEn: Which is better: NTE or ZZZ?
answer: 异环和绝区零各有特色，适合不同玩家。异环是开放世界动作RPG，拥有无缝大地图探索、买房系统、开车等玩法，沉浸感更强；绝区零是箱庭副本制，节奏更快更聚焦战斗。异环抽卡没有50/50机制，获得限定角色更稳定；绝区零有50/50则需要一定运气。喜欢自由探索和开放世界选异环，喜欢快节奏动作和影视化叙事选绝区零。
answerEn: NTE and ZZZ suit different players. NTE is an open-world action RPG with seamless exploration, housing, and driving for greater immersion, while ZZZ uses instanced zones with faster, combat-focused pacing. NTE has no 50/50 gacha system, making limited characters more reliable to obtain, whereas ZZZ uses a 50/50 mechanic. Choose NTE for open-world freedom and exploration, or ZZZ for fast-paced action and cinematic storytelling.

question: 异环觉醒系统怎么玩？
questionEn: How does NTE's awakening system work?
answer: 异环的觉醒系统是对角色的进一步强化机制，每个角色有6个觉醒等级。觉醒需要消耗对应角色的信物碎片和专用觉醒材料。在觉醒3级和6级时会解锁核心共鸣效果，大幅提升角色能力。觉醒材料主要来源于高难副本、周常挑战和活动兑换。建议优先觉醒主C角色，收益最为明显。
answerEn: NTE's awakening system provides further character enhancement with 6 awakening levels per character. Awakening requires character-specific sigil fragments and dedicated awakening materials. At awakening levels 3 and 6, you unlock core resonance effects that significantly boost character power. Awakening materials come mainly from high-difficulty domains, weekly challenges, and event exchanges. Prioritize awakening your main DPS for the most noticeable improvement.

question: 异环新手配队推荐？
questionEn: Best beginner team in NTE?
answer: 新手推荐使用免费获得的S级角色组成过渡阵容。前排推荐娜娜莉（生命/格斗）作为主C，搭配咲里或薄荷（咒术/支援）提供增益。后排选择一个副C和一个治疗或护盾角色。开局送的A级角色也完全可以通关前期所有内容。重点是保证阵容中有主属性覆盖齐全的角色，避免遇到属性克制的敌人时无法应对。
answerEn: For beginners, build a team using free S-rank characters as a starting lineup. Use Nanally (Anima/Fangs and Claws) as main DPS in the front, paired with Sakiri or Mint (Incantation/Support) for buffs. Place a sub-DPS and a healer or shield character in the back row. The free A-rank characters can clear all early-game content. Focus on covering multiple attributes in your team so you can handle enemies with various elemental weaknesses.

question: 异环怎么买房？
questionEn: How to buy a house in NTE?
answer: 异环的买房系统需要先完成主线剧情推进到一定章节后解锁。解锁后前往指定区域的房产中介NPC处可以选择购买的房型。不同位置的房产价格不同，部分稀有地段需要特殊货币购买。买房后可以自定义装修，放置家具和装饰品，同时部分房产会提供属性加成或资源产出等实用收益。
answerEn: NTE's housing system unlocks after progressing the main story to a certain chapter. Once unlocked, visit the real estate NPC in designated areas to browse and purchase houses. Prices vary by location, and some premium spots require special currency. After purchasing, you can customize the interior with furniture and decorations. Certain properties also provide stat bonuses or passive resource generation as practical benefits.

question: 异环P5R联动怎么参加？
questionEn: How to join NTE P5R collaboration?
answer: 异环与女神异闻录5皇家版（P5R）的联动是以音乐合作为主的活动。玩家需要在游戏内完成特定联动任务即可参与，活动期间登录即可获得联动限定奖励。联动内容包括限定音乐曲目和主题装饰道具等。建议关注游戏内公告获取最新的活动参与条件和时间安排，确保不会错过限时奖励。
answerEn: The NTE x Persona 5 Royal collaboration is primarily a music-focused crossover event. Players can participate by completing specific collaboration quests in-game, and simply logging in during the event period grants limited-time rewards. The collab content includes exclusive music tracks and themed decorative items. Check in-game announcements for the latest participation requirements and schedule to ensure you don't miss the limited-time rewards.

question: 异环国际服怎么下载？
questionEn: How to download NTE global server?
answer: 异环国际服于2026年4月29日正式上线。PC端可通过官网下载客户端或通过Steam商店搜索异环下载。iOS用户在App Store搜索异环即可下载，Android用户可通过Google Play或官网下载APK安装包。下载前请确认设备满足最低配置要求，建议预留足够的存储空间以保证流畅运行。
answerEn: The NTE global server officially launches on April 29, 2026. PC players can download the client from the official website or find NTE on Steam. iOS users can search for NTE on the App Store, while Android users can download via Google Play or the official APK from the website. Make sure your device meets the minimum system requirements and has sufficient storage space for a smooth experience.

question: 异环免费S级角色有哪些？
questionEn: Which S-rank characters are free in NTE?
answer: 异环中可以通过免费途径获得多个S级角色。首先是通过城市经营玩法可以获得小智（S级）。新手阶段会提供S级角色自选券，可从薄荷和咲里中选择一个。此外在标准池累计抽取50次后还可以获得一张S级自选券。这些免费S级角色培养价值很高，建议根据自己阵容需求合理选择。
answerEn: You can obtain several S-rank characters for free in NTE. Xiaozhi (S-rank) is available through the City Tycoon gameplay mode. During the beginner phase, you receive an S-rank selector ticket to choose between Mint and Sakiri. Additionally, after accumulating 50 pulls on the standard banner, you earn another S-rank selector ticket. These free S-rank characters are well worth investing in, so choose based on your team composition needs.

question: 异环怎么开车？
questionEn: How to drive in NTE?
answer: 异环中的载具系统在完成主线一定进度后自动解锁。解锁后可以在开放世界中召唤载具，使用方向键控制移动，支持加速和漂移操作。游戏内有多种载具类型，包括轿车、摩托车等，部分可以通过活动或商店获取。载具能大幅提升大地图探索效率，是快速移动和赶路的重要工具。
answerEn: NTE's vehicle system unlocks automatically after reaching a certain point in the main story. Once unlocked, you can summon vehicles in the open world and control them with directional inputs, including acceleration and drifting. The game features multiple vehicle types including cars and motorcycles, with some available through events or shops. Vehicles significantly improve open-world exploration efficiency and are essential for quick travel across the map.

question: 异环拍照模式怎么用？
questionEn: How to use photo mode in NTE?
answer: 异环的拍照模式可以在游戏内通过快捷键或菜单进入。进入拍照模式后可以自由调整相机角度、焦距和构图。系统提供多种滤镜和特效供选择，还可以调整角色表情和动作姿势。拍摄的照片可以保存到本地相册，也可以直接分享到社交平台。拍照模式不会暂停部分在线功能，使用时请注意周围环境安全。
answerEn: NTE's photo mode can be accessed via a hotkey or the in-game menu. Once active, you can freely adjust the camera angle, focal length, and composition. The system offers various filters and effects, and you can change character expressions and pose animations. Photos can be saved locally or shared directly to social media platforms. Note that photo mode does not pause all online functions, so be mindful of your surroundings while using it.

question: 异环公测能白嫖多少抽？
questionEn: How many free pulls at NTE launch?
answer: 异环公测期间玩家总共可以获得约418次免费抽卡机会。这些抽卡资源来源包括：新手福利和七日签到约80抽、主线和支线任务通关奖励约100抽、探索进度和成就奖励约60抽、预约里程碑和公测活动约100抽、以及各类兑换码和补偿约78抽。数量会随版本活动和运营策略有所浮动，建议关注官方公告获取最新信息。
answerEn: Players can earn approximately 418 free pulls during the NTE global launch period. These gacha resources come from multiple sources: beginner福利 and 7-day login bonuses (~80 pulls), main story and side quest completion rewards (~100 pulls), exploration progress and achievement rewards (~60 pulls), pre-registration milestones and launch events (~100 pulls), plus redemption codes and compensations (~78 pulls). The exact number may vary with version updates and events, so check official announcements for the latest information.
